          <!-- Filter Bar for PDF Final -->
          <div class="filter-bar" style="display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
            <div class="fg" style="width:120px"><label>Jenis</label><select id="pdfType"><option value="">Semua</option><option value="PD">PD</option><option value="PR">PR</option></select></div>
            <div class="fg" style="width:140px"><label>Departemen</label><select id="pdfDept">
              <option value="">Semua Departemen</option>
              <option value="HRGA">HRGA</option>
              <option value="QAQC">QAQC</option>
              <option value="SHE">SHE</option>
              <option value="Engineering">Engineering</option>
              <option value="Plant">Plant</option>
              <option value="External">External</option>
              <option value="Eksplorasi">Eksplorasi</option>
            </select></div>
            <div class="fg" style="width:120px"><label>Bulan</label><select id="pdfMonth">
              <option value="">Semua Bulan</option>
              <option value="01">Januari</option>
              <option value="02">Februari</option>
              <option value="03">Maret</option>
              <option value="04">April</option>
              <option value="05">Mei</option>
              <option value="06">Juni</option>
              <option value="07">Juli</option>
              <option value="08">Agustus</option>
              <option value="09">September</option>
              <option value="10">Oktober</option>
              <option value="11">November</option>
              <option value="12">Desember</option>
            </select></div>
            <div class="fg" style="width:100px"><label>Tahun</label><select id="pdfYear">
              <option value="">Semua Tahun</option>
              <option value="2025">2025</option>
              <option value="2026">2026</option>
              <option value="2027">2027</option>
            </select></div>
            <div class="fg" style="width:180px"><label>Cari (No. Dokumen / Subject)</label><input type="text" id="pdfSearch" placeholder="Cari..." style="padding:6px 10px; background:var(--bg-input,#0f172a); border:1px solid var(--border,#334155); color:var(--text,#f1f5f9); border-radius:6px; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box;"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="loadPDFArchive()"><i class="fas fa-filter"></i> Filter</button>
          </div>
          
          <div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="app-tbl"><thead><tr><th>No</th><th>No. Dokumen</th><th>Jenis</th><th>Subject</th><th>Approved Date</th><th>Action</th></tr></thead><tbody id="pdfArchiveTbody"></tbody></table></div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- MASTER DATA VIEWS (simplified) -->
      <section id="view-master-dept" class="view"><div class="panel"><div class="panel-ttl">Master Data – Department</div><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="app-tbl"><thead><tr><th>No</th><th>Kode</th><th>Nama Department</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead><tbody id="mDeptTbody"></tbody></table></div></div></section>
      <section id="view-master-project" class="view"><div class="panel"><div class="panel-ttl">Master Data – Project</div><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="app-tbl"><thead><tr><th>No</th><th>Kode</th><th>Nama Project</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead><tbody id="mProjTbody"></tbody></table></div></div></section>
      <section id="view-master-coa" class="view"><div class="panel"><div class="panel-ttl">Master Data – Cost Code / COA</div><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="app-tbl"><thead><tr><th>No</th><th>Kode COA</th><th>Deskripsi</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead><tbody id="mCoaTbody"></tbody></table></div></div></section>
      <section id="view-master-user" class="view">
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-ttl">Master Data – User Management</div>
          <div id="adminUserActions" style="display:none; margin-bottom:12px;">
            <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openAddUserModal()"><i class="fas fa-user-plus"></i> Tambah User</button>
          </div>
          <div class="tbl-wrap">
            <table class="app-tbl">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>No</th>
                  <th>Username</th>
                  <th>Nama Lengkap</th>
                  <th>Role</th>
                  <th>Department</th>
                  <th>Status</th>
                  <th class="admin-only-col" style="display:none; width:120px; text-align:center;">Aksi</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody id="mUserTbody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
      <section id="view-matrix" class="view">
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-ttl" style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">
            <span>Matrix Approval – Alur Persetujuan</span>
            <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm admin-only-col" style="display:none; padding:4px 8px; font-size:11px;" onclick="openAddMatrixModal()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Tambah Matrix</button>
          </div>
          <div class="tbl-wrap">
            <table class="app-tbl">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>No</th>
                  <th>Jenis Dokumen</th>
                  <th>Departement</th>
                  <th>Min Nominal</th>
                  <th>Max Nominal</th>
                  <th>Alur Approval (Step)</th>
                  <th class="admin-only-col" style="display:none; width:150px; text-align:center;">Aksi</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody id="matrixTbody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
      <section id="view-audit" class="view"><div class="panel"><div class="panel-ttl">Log Audit Trail System</div><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="app-tbl"><thead><tr><th>No</th><th>Timestamp</th><th>User</th><th>Aktivitas</th><th>Modul</th><th>No. Dokumen</th><th>IP Address</th></tr></thead><tbody id="auditTbody"></tbody></table></div></div></section>

    </div><!-- /content -->
  </main>
</div><!-- /app -->

<!-- REVIEW MODAL -->
<div class="modal-bg" id="reviewModal">
  <div class="modal-box" style="width:980px">
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px">Review Dokumen</div>
        <div id="mdocNum" style="font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--cy)"></div>
      </div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;background:var(--bg3);padding:14px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:16px;border:1px solid var(--border)">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase">Pengaju / Dept</div><div id="mReq" style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:10px"></div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase">Tanggal / Prioritas</div><div id="mDate" style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px"></div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase">Perihal</div><div id="mSubj" style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:10px"></div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase">Total Nominal</div><div id="mTotal" style="font-weight:800;font-size:14px;color:var(--cy)"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--cy);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px">Rincian Item</div>
      <div class="tbl-wrap" style="margin-bottom:16px"><table class="app-tbl"><thead><tr><th>No</th><th>PC/COA</th><th>Deskripsi</th><th>Qty</th><th>UoM</th><th>Harga Satuan</th><th>Total</th></tr></thead><tbody id="mItemsTbody"></tbody></table></div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--or);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px">Status Workflow Approval</div>
      <div class="sig-row" id="mSigRow"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-ftr">
      <button class="btn btn-danger" id="btnReject" onclick="doApprove('REJECT')"><i class="fas fa-times-circle"></i> Tolak Dokumen</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="previewPDFModal()"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Preview PDF</button>
      <button class="btn btn-success" id="btnApprove" onclick="doApprove('APPROVE')"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Setujui & e-Sign</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PDF PREVIEW MODAL -->
<div class="modal-bg" id="pdfModal">
  <div class="modal-box" style="width:98vw;max-width:950px;max-height:96vh">

</div>

<!-- ================== MODAL: CUSTOM SIGNATURE (DRAW) ================== -->
<div class="modal-bg" id="signatureModal">
  <div class="modal-box" style="width:380px; max-width:90%">
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px">Pengaturan Profil</div>
        <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--cy)">Kustomisasi Tanda Tangan</div>
      </div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeSignatureModal()">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" style="text-align:center">
      <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t2);margin-bottom:12px">Gambar tanda tangan Anda pada kolom di bawah:</p>
      <div style="margin-bottom: 12px; font-size:11px; color:var(--t2); text-align:center;">
        <span style="font-weight:700">Atau upload gambar tanda tangan:</span><br>
        <input type="file" id="signature-upload" accept="image/*" style="margin-top:6px; font-size:11px; max-width:200px; padding: 4px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--bg3);" onchange="handleSignatureUpload(event)">
      </div>
      <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:6px;border:2px dashed var(--cy);display:inline-block;margin-bottom:12px">
        <canvas id="signature-canvas" width="280" height="120" style="cursor:crosshair;background:#fff;display:block;touch-action:none"></canvas>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px">
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm" onclick="clearSignatureCanvas()"><i class="fas fa-eraser"></i> Hapus</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" onclick="saveSignature()"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Simpan TTD</button>
      </div>
      <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:12px;text-align:left">
        <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px">Tanda Tangan Aktif Anda</div>
        <div id="active-signature-preview" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;height:60px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;padding:4px">
          <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t3);font-style:italic">Belum ada tanda tangan kustom</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-ftr">
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="closeSignatureModal()">Tutup</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal-bg" id="userModal">
  <div class="modal-box" style="width:400px; max-width:90%">
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px" id="userModalSub">Master Data</div>
        <div id="userModalTitle" style="font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--cy)">Tambah User Baru</div>
      </div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeUserModal()">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <form id="userForm" onsubmit="saveUser(event)">

        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <label>Nama Lengkap</label>
          <input type="text" id="userFormName" placeholder="Masukkan nama lengkap..." required>
        </div>
        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <label>Username</label>
          <input type="text" id="userFormUser" placeholder="username.anda" required>
        </div>
        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <label>Password</label>
          <input type="password" id="userFormPass" placeholder="••••••••" required>
        </div>
        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <label>Approval Role</label>
          <select id="userFormRole" required>
            <option value="User">User</option>
            <option value="Head Department">Head Department</option>
            <option value="Project Manager">Project Manager</option>
            <option value="KTT">KTT</option>
            <option value="Finance">Finance</option>
            <option value="Cost Control">Cost Control</option>
            <option value="GM/CFO">GM/CFO</option>
            <option value="Administrator">Administrator</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <label>Department</label>
          <select id="userFormDept" required></select>
        </div>
        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <label>Status</label>
          <select id="userFormStatus" required>
            <option value="Active">Active</option>
            <option value="Inactive">Inactive</option>
            <option value="Cuti">Cuti (On Leave)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <button type="submit" style="display:none;" id="submitUserFormBtn"></button>
      </form>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-ftr">
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="closeUserModal()">Tutup</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="$('submitUserFormBtn').click()"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Simpan User</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BUDGET TAHUNAN MODAL -->
<div class="modal-bg" id="budgetModal">
  <div class="modal-box" style="width:420px; max-width:92%">
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px">Budget Control</div>
        <div id="budgetModalTitle" style="font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--cy)">Tambah Budget Tahunan</div>
      </div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeBudgetModal()">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <form id="budgetForm" onsubmit="saveBudgetRecord(event)">
        <input type="hidden" id="budgetFormId">
        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <label>Departemen <span style="color:red">*</span></label>
          <select id="budgetFormDept" required style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;">
            <option value="">-- Pilih Departemen --</option>
            <option value="HRGA">HRGA</option>
            <option value="QAQC">QAQC</option>
            <option value="SHE">SHE</option>
            <option value="Engineering">Engineering</option>
            <option value="Plant">Plant</option>
            <option value="External">External</option>
            <option value="Eksplorasi">Eksplorasi</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <label>Tahun <span style="color:red">*</span></label>
          <input type="number" id="budgetFormYear" min="2020" max="2035" placeholder="Contoh: 2026" required style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;box-sizing:border-box;">
        </div>
        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <label>Annual Budget (Rp) <span style="color:red">*</span></label>
          <input type="number" id="budgetFormAnnual" min="0" placeholder="Contoh: 650000000" required style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;box-sizing:border-box;">
          <div id="budgetFormAnnualPreview" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--cy);margin-top:3px;"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:4px">
          <label>Actual Budget (Rp)</label>
          <input type="number" id="budgetFormActual" min="0" placeholder="Contoh: 420000000" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;box-sizing:border-box;">
          <div id="budgetFormActualPreview" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--t3);margin-top:3px;"></div>
        </div>
        <button type="submit" style="display:none;" id="submitBudgetFormBtn"></button>
      </form>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-ftr">
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="closeBudgetModal()">Batal</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="$('submitBudgetFormBtn').click()"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Simpan Budget</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MATRIX MODAL -->
<div class="modal-bg" id="matrixModal">

        <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:10px;">

/* ==============================================
   UTILITIES
   ============================================== */
const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
const rp = v => new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format(Math.round(v));
const rpFull = v => 'Rp ' + rp(v);
const loader = v => $('loader').style.display = v ? 'flex' : 'none';

function toast(msg, err) {
  const w = $('toast-wrap');
  const d = document.createElement('div');
  d.className = 'toast';
  d.style.borderColor = err ? 'var(--rd)' : 'var(--cy)';
  d.innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-${err?'exclamation-circle':'check-circle'}" style="color:${err?'var(--rd)':'var(--cy)'}"></i>${msg}`;
  w.appendChild(d);
  setTimeout(() => d.remove(), 4000);
}

// Convert number to Indonesian words
function terbilang(num) {
  if (num === 0) return 'nol rupiah';
  const satuan = ['','satu','dua','tiga','empat','lima','enam','tujuh','delapan','sembilan',
    'sepuluh','sebelas','dua belas','tiga belas','empat belas','lima belas','enam belas',
    'tujuh belas','delapan belas','sembilan belas'];
  function group(n, suffix) {
    if (n === 0) return '';
    if (n < 20) return satuan[n] + (suffix ? ' ' + suffix : '') + ' ';
    if (n < 100) return satuan[Math.floor(n/10)*10 - (Math.floor(n/10)*10 - Math.floor(n/10)*10) + Math.floor(n/10)] + ' puluh ' + (n%10 ? satuan[n%10]+' ' : '');
    // Fix: correct puluhan
    let result = '';
    const r10 = Math.floor(n/10)%10, r1 = n%10, r100 = Math.floor(n/100);
    if(r100) result += satuan[r100] + ' ratus ';
    if(r10 === 1) { result += satuan[10 + r1] + ' '; }
    else { if(r10) result += satuan[r10] + ' puluh '; if(r1) result += satuan[r1] + ' '; }
    return result + (suffix ? suffix + ' ' : '');
  }
  let n = Math.floor(num), result = '';
  const triliun = Math.floor(n / 1000000000000); n %= 1000000000000;
  const miliar = Math.floor(n / 1000000000); n %= 1000000000;
  const juta = Math.floor(n / 1000000); n %= 1000000;
  const ribu = Math.floor(n / 1000); n %= 1000;
  const sisa = n;
  if(triliun) result += group(triliun,'triliun');
  if(miliar) result += group(miliar,'miliar');
  if(juta) result += group(juta,'juta');
  if(ribu === 1) result += 'seribu '; else if(ribu) result += group(ribu,'ribu');
  if(sisa) result += group(sisa,'');
  return (result.trim() || 'nol') + ' rupiah';
}

function genSVGSig(name) {
  let h = 0;
  for(let i = 0; i < name.length; i++) h = name.charCodeAt(i) + ((h << 5) - h);
  const g = (s, sc) => Math.sin(s + h) * sc;
  const path = `M 10,${23+g(1,4)} Q 28,${12+g(2,7)} 46,${23+g(3,4)} T 80,${20+g(4,6)} Q 98,${36+g(5,5)} 115,${22+g(6,4)} M 7,${29+g(7,3)} C 45,${42+g(8,2)} 90,${40+g(9,2)} 126,${30+g(10,3)}`;
  return `<svg class="esig" viewBox="0 0 135 48"><path d="${path}"/></svg>`;
}

function isPMOnLeave() {
  const pmUser = DB.users.find(u => u.role === 'Project Manager');
  return pmUser && pmUser.status === 'Cuti';
}

function getApprovalSteps(type, dept, amount) {
  const matched = DB.matrix.filter(m => {
    const typeMatch = m.type === type;
    const deptMatch = m.dept === 'ALL' || m.dept === dept;
    const amountMatch = amount >= m.min && amount <= m.max;
    return typeMatch && deptMatch && amountMatch;
  });
  matched.sort((a, b) => {
    if (a.dept !== 'ALL' && b.dept === 'ALL') return -1;
    if (a.dept === 'ALL' && b.dept !== 'ALL') return 1;
    return 0;
  });
  return matched.length ? matched[0].steps : (type==='PD' ? ['Project Manager','Finance'] : ['Supervisor','Finance','Project Manager']);
}

/* ==============================================
   LOGIN
   ============================================== */
function buildDemoChips() {
  const wrap = $('demoChips');
  DB.users.forEach(u => {
    const chip = document.createElement('div');
    chip.className = 'account-chip';
    chip.innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-user"></i><b>${u.name}</b><span style="color:var(--t3)">(${u.role})</span>`;
    chip.onclick = () => {
      $('loginUser').value = u.username;
      $('loginPass').value = u.password;
    };
    wrap.appendChild(chip);
  });
}

function doLogin(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const username = $('loginUser').value.trim();
  const password = $('loginPass').value;
  const normInput = username.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '.');
  const user = DB.users.find(u => {
    const normDb = u.username.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '.');
    return normDb === normInput && u.password === password;
  });
  if (!user) {
    $('loginErr').style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }
  $('loginErr').style.display = 'none';
  session = user;
  sessionStorage.setItem('currentUser', JSON.stringify(session));
  $('loginPage').style.display = 'none';
  $('app').style.display = 'flex';
  initApp();
}

function doLogout() {
  session = null;
  sessionStorage.removeItem('currentUser');
  $('app').style.display = 'none';
  $('loginPage').style.display = 'flex';
  $('loginUser').value = '';
  $('loginPass').value = '';
}

/* ==============================================
   THEME TOGGLE
   ============================================== */
function toggleTheme(event) {
  if (event) event.stopPropagation();
  const currentTheme = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') || 'light';
  const newTheme = currentTheme === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', newTheme);
  localStorage.setItem('theme', newTheme);
  updateThemeIcon(newTheme);
}

function updateThemeIcon(theme) {
  const icon = document.getElementById('theme-toggle-icon');
  if (icon) {
    if (theme === 'dark') {
      icon.className = 'fas fa-sun';
      icon.style.color = 'var(--or)';
    } else {
      icon.className = 'fas fa-moon';
      icon.style.color = '';
    }
  }
}

/* ==============================================
   APP INIT
   ============================================== */
function initApp() {
  // Sync Dark/Light Mode toggle icon on load
  const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('theme') || 'light';
  updateThemeIcon(savedTheme);
  
  if (window.Chart) {
    Chart.defaults.color = savedTheme === 'dark' ? '#cbd5e1' : '#475569';
  }

  // Update header
  const initials = session.name.split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').slice(0,2);
  $('hdrAvt').textContent = initials;
  $('hdrName').textContent = session.name;
  $('hdrRole').textContent = session.role;

  // Show/hide Admin menus
  const isAdmin = session && session.role === 'Administrator';
  const userItem = document.querySelector('.sb-item[data-view="master-user"]');
  const matrixItem = document.querySelector('.sb-item[data-view="matrix"]');
  if (userItem) userItem.style.display = isAdmin ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (matrixItem) matrixItem.style.display = isAdmin ? 'block' : 'none';

  // Nav events
  document.querySelectorAll('.sb-item').forEach(item => {
    item.addEventListener('click', () => nav(item.getAttribute('data-view')));
  });

  // Pending badge
  updatePendingBadge();

  // Load dashboard
  nav('dashboard');
}

function updatePendingBadge() {
  const isPmLeave = isPMOnLeave();
  const count = DB.requests.filter(r => 
    r.status === 'Pending' && 
    (r.currentApprover === session.role || (session.role === 'KTT' && isPmLeave && r.currentApprover === 'Project Manager'))
  ).length;
  $('pendingBadge').textContent = count;
  $('pendingBadge').style.display = count > 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
  $('notifCount').textContent = count;
}

function nav(view, opts) {
  const isAdmin = session && session.role === 'Administrator';
  if ((view === 'master-user' || view === 'matrix') && !isAdmin) {
    toast('Akses ditolak: Menu ini hanya untuk Administrator.', true);
    return;
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('.sb-item').forEach(n => n.classList.toggle('active', n.getAttribute('data-view') === view));
  document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active'));
  const panel = $('view-' + view);
  if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');

  const breadcrumbs = {
    'dashboard': 'Dashboard',
    'pd-new': 'Pengajuan Dana (PD) › Buat Baru',
    'pr-new': 'Purchase Request (PR) › Buat Baru',
    'approval': 'Approval › Menunggu Approval',
    'history': 'Pengajuan Aktif',
    'archive': 'Riwayat Pengajuan',
    'approved-list': 'Approval › Sudah Disetujui',
    'rejected-list': 'Approval › Ditolak',
    'draft': 'Draft',
    'budget': 'Budget Control',
    'budget-tahunan': 'Budget Tahunan',
    'pdf-archive': 'PDF Final',
    'master-dept': 'Master Data › Department',
    'master-project': 'Master Data › Project',
    'master-coa': 'Master Data › Cost Code',
    'master-user': 'Master Data › User',
    'matrix': 'Sistem › Matrix Approval',
    'audit': 'Sistem › Audit Trail'
  };
  $('breadcrumb').innerHTML = `Dashboard › <b>${breadcrumbs[view] || view}</b>`;

  if (view === 'dashboard') loadDashboard();
  else if (view === 'pd-new') initPDForm();
  else if (view === 'pr-new') initPRForm();
  else if (view === 'approval') loadApproval();
  else if (view === 'history') loadListView('hisTbody', DB.requests.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending'), true);
  else if (view === 'archive') {
    $('archType').value = '';
    $('archStatus').value = '';
    $('archDept').value = '';
    $('archMonth').value = '';
    $('archYear').value = '';
    loadListView('archTbody', DB.requests, true);
  }
  else if (view === 'approved-list') loadListView('appListTbody', DB.requests.filter(r=>r.status==='Approved'), true);
  else if (view === 'rejected-list') loadListView('rejListTbody', DB.requests.filter(r=>r.status==='Rejected'), true);
  else if (view === 'draft') loadDraftView();
  else if (view === 'budget') loadBudget();
  else if (view === 'budget-tahunan') loadBudgetTahunan();
  else if (view === 'pdf-archive') {
    if ($('pdfType')) $('pdfType').value = '';
    if ($('pdfDept')) {
      const isFinanceOrAdmin = session && (
        session.role === 'Finance' || 
        session.dept === 'Finance' || 
        session.role === 'Administrator' || 
        session.dept === 'IT'
      );
      if (!isFinanceOrAdmin && session && session.dept) {
        $('pdfDept').value = session.dept;
        $('pdfDept').disabled = true;
      } else {
        $('pdfDept').value = '';
        $('pdfDept').disabled = false;
      }
    }
    if ($('pdfMonth')) $('pdfMonth').value = '';
    if ($('pdfYear')) $('pdfYear').value = '';
    if ($('pdfSearch')) $('pdfSearch').value = '';
    loadPDFArchive();
  }
  else if (view === 'master-dept') loadMaster('dept');
  else if (view === 'master-project') loadMaster('project');
  else if (view === 'master-coa') loadMaster('coa');
  else if (view === 'master-user') loadMaster('user');
  else if (view === 'matrix') loadMatrix();
  else if (view === 'audit') loadAudit();
}

/* ==============================================
   DASHBOARD
   ============================================== */
function loadDashboard() {
  const reqs = DB.requests;
  const totalPD = reqs.filter(r=>r.type==='PD').reduce((a,r)=>a+r.nominal,0);
  const totalPR = reqs.filter(r=>r.type==='PR').reduce((a,r)=>a+r.nominal,0);
  const cntPD = reqs.filter(r=>r.type==='PD').length;
  const cntPR = reqs.filter(r=>r.type==='PR').length;
  const pending = reqs.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending').length;
  const approved = reqs.filter(r=>r.status==='Approved').length;
  const rejected = reqs.filter(r=>r.status==='Rejected').length;
  const totalBudg = DB.budgets.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.Annual,0);
  const usedBudg = DB.budgets.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.Actual,0);
  const avail = totalBudg - usedBudg;
  const util = Math.round(usedBudg/totalBudg*100);

  $('kTotalPD').textContent = rpFull(totalPD); $('kCntPD').textContent = cntPD + ' Dokumen';
  $('kTotalPR').textContent = rpFull(totalPR); $('kCntPR').textContent = cntPR + ' Dokumen';
  $('kPend').textContent = pending; $('kApp').textContent = approved; $('kRej').textContent = rejected;
  $('kBudg').textContent = rpFull(avail); $('kBudgOf').textContent = 'dari ' + rpFull(totalBudg);
  $('utilLbl').textContent = util + '%';

  $('cntHD').textContent = reqs.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending'&&r.currentApprover==='Head Department').length + ' Pending';
  $('cntPM').textContent = reqs.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending'&&r.currentApprover==='Project Manager').length + ' Pending';
  $('cntFin').textContent = reqs.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending'&&r.currentApprover==='Finance').length + ' Pending';
  $('cntCC').textContent = reqs.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending'&&r.currentApprover==='Cost Control').length + ' Pending';
  $('cntGM').textContent = reqs.filter(r=>r.status==='Pending'&&r.currentApprover==='GM/CFO').length + ' Pending';

  // Dept grid
  const dg = $('deptGrid'); dg.innerHTML = '';
  DB.budgets.forEach(b => {
    const pd = reqs.filter(r=>r.dept===b.Dept&&r.type==='PD').length;
    const pr = reqs.filter(r=>r.dept===b.Dept&&r.type==='PR').length;
    const d = document.createElement('div'); d.className = 'dept-card';
    d.innerHTML = `<div class="dept-name">${b.Dept}</div><div class="dept-cnt">PD:${pd} | PR:${pr}</div><div class="dept-bgt">${rpFull(b.Annual)}</div>`;
    dg.appendChild(d);
  });

  // Activity table
  const tb = $('actTbody'); tb.innerHTML = '';
  reqs.forEach((r, i) => {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML = `<td>${i+1}</td><td><span class="pill p-${r.type.toLowerCase()}">${r.type}</span></td><td><a style="color:var(--cy);cursor:pointer" onclick="openReview('${r.id}')">${r.docNumber}</a></td><td>${r.subject.slice(0,42)}...</td><td>${r.requester}</td><td><span class="pill p-${r.status.toLowerCase()}">${r.status}</span></td><td>${r.date}</td>`;
    tb.appendChild(tr);
  });

  // Notif
  const nl = $('notifList'); nl.innerHTML = '';
  const localList = $('local-notif-dropdown-list'); if (localList) localList.innerHTML = '';
  const logsToShow = DB.logs.slice(0,5);
  
  if (logsToShow.length === 0) {
    nl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding: 15px; color: var(--t3); text-align: center; font-size: 11px;">Belum ada notifikasi</div>';
    if (localList) localList.innerHTML = '<div style="padding: 15px; color: var(--t3); text-align: center; font-size: 11px;">Belum ada notifikasi</div>';
  } else {
    logsToShow.forEach(l => {
      const d = document.createElement('div'); d.className = 'notif-item';
      d.innerHTML = `<div class="notif-icon"><i class="fas fa-bell"></i></div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600"><b>${l.user}</b> – ${l.act}</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--t3)">${l.ts} | ${l.doc}</div></div>`;
      nl.appendChild(d);
      
      if (localList) {
        const itemDiv = document.createElement('div');
        itemDiv.style.display = 'flex';
        itemDiv.style.gap = '10px';
        itemDiv.style.padding = '8px 16px';
        itemDiv.style.borderBottom = '1px solid #e2e8f0';
        itemDiv.style.alignItems = 'flex-start';
        itemDiv.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background: #f8fafc; color: #f59e0b; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px;">
            <i class="fas fa-bell"></i>
          </div>
          <div style="flex-grow: 1; min-width: 0;">
            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: #1e293b; line-height: 1.4; word-wrap: break-word;">
              <strong>${l.user}</strong> ${l.act}
              <div style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 10px; color: #0ea5e9; display: inline-block; margin-top: 1px;">${l.doc}</div>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size: 9px; color: #64748b; margin-top: 2px;">${l.ts}</div>
          </div>
        `;
        localList.appendChild(itemDiv);
      }
    });
  }

  // Update unread count badge
  const unreadCount = $('local-notif-unread-count');
  const count = logsToShow.length;
  if (count > 0) {
    $('notifCount').textContent = count;
    $('notifCount').style.display = 'block';
    if (unreadCount) {
      unreadCount.textContent = count > 9 ? '9+' : count;
      unreadCount.style.display = 'inline-block';
    }
  } else {
    $('notifCount').style.display = 'none';
    if (unreadCount) unreadCount.style.display = 'none';
  }


  // Charts
  renderDashCharts(util);
}

function renderDashCharts(util) {
  const months = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','Mei','Jun'];
  const pal = ['#0ea5e9','#f59e0b','#2563eb','#10b981','#ef4444','#d946ef','#64748b'];
  const co = {plugins:{legend:{labels:{color:'#475569'}}},scales:{x:{grid:{color:'#e2e8f0'},ticks:{color:'#64748b'}},y:{grid:{color:'#e2e8f0'},ticks:{color:'#64748b'}}}};
  if(charts.m) charts.m.destroy();
  charts.m = new Chart($('chartMonthly').getContext('2d'),{type:'line',data:{labels:months,datasets:[{label:'PD',data:[1200000000,1500000000,1800000000,1400000000,2100000000,2540000000],borderColor:'#0ea5e9',backgroundColor:'rgba(14,165,233,.08)',fill:true,tension:.4},{label:'PR',data:[900000000,1100000000,1300000000,1200000000,1500000000,1780500000],borderColor:'#f59e0b',backgroundColor:'rgba(245,158,11,.08)',fill:true,tension:.4}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,...co}});
  if(charts.d) charts.d.destroy();
  charts.d = new Chart($('chartDept').getContext('2d'),{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:DB.budgets.map(b=>b.Dept),datasets:[{data:DB.budgets.map(b=>b.Actual),backgroundColor:pal}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{position:'right',labels:{color:'#475569',boxWidth:10}}}}});
  if(charts.u) charts.u.destroy();
  charts.u = new Chart($('chartUtil').getContext('2d'),{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:['Used','Available'],datasets:[{data:[util,100-util],backgroundColor:['#10b981','#e2e8f0'],borderWidth:0}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:'80%',rotation:270,circumference:180,plugins:{legend:{display:false}}}});
}

/* ==============================================
   PD FORM
   ============================================== */
function initPDForm() {
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
  $('pdDate').value = today;
  $('pdDept').value = session.dept;
  const docNo = genDocNo('PD');
  $('pdDocNo').value = docNo;
  updatePDMeta();

  // Clear items
  $('pdSubj').value = '';
  $('pdUserFor').value = '';
  $('pdItemsTbody').innerHTML = '';
  
  // Custom PM Reset
  $('pdCustomPm').value = 'Yohanes Sam';
  $('pdCustomPmManual').style.display = 'none';
  $('pdCustomPmManual').value = '';
  
  addPDRow();
  updatePDMeta();
}

function updatePDMeta() {
  $('pdDocNoDisplay').innerText = $('pdDocNo').value || '-';
  $('pdDateDisplay').innerText = $('pdDate').value ? new Date($('pdDate').value).toLocaleDateString('id-ID',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : '-';
  $('pdSubjDisplay').innerText = $('pdSubj').value || '-';
  
  // Custom PM Toggle
  const customPmSel = $('pdCustomPm');
  const customPmManual = $('pdCustomPmManual');
  if (customPmSel.value === 'custom') {
    customPmManual.style.display = 'block';
  } else {
    customPmManual.style.display = 'none';
    customPmManual.value = '';
  }
  
  // Re-render preview with the new PM name
  calcPDTotal();
}

function addPDRow() {
  const tb = $('pdItemsTbody');
  const n = tb.rows.length + 1;
  const pcOpts = DB.projects.map(p=>`<option value="${p.Code}">${p.Code}</option>`).join('');
  const coaOpts = DB.coas.map(c=>`<option value="${c.Code}">${c.Code}</option>`).join('');
  const tr = document.createElement('tr');
  tr.innerHTML = `
    <td class="td-num">${n}</td>
    <td><input type="text" placeholder="PC..." style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10.5px;color:#111;background:transparent;text-align:center;"></td>
    <td><input type="text" placeholder="DR..." style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10px;color:#111;background:transparent;text-align:center;"></td>
    <td><input type="text" placeholder="Deskripsi barang/jasa..." style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10.5px;color:#111" oninput="calcPDTotal()"></td>
    <td><input type="number" value="1" min="1" style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10.5px;color:#111;text-align:right" oninput="calcPDTotal()"></td>
    <td><input type="number" value="0" min="0" style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10.5px;color:#111;text-align:right" oninput="calcPDTotal()"></td>
    <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700" class="pd-row-amt">0</td>
    <td><input type="text" placeholder="Keterangan..." style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10px;color:#555"></td>
    <td class="td-del"><button class="del-btn" onclick="delPDRow(this)" title="Hapus"><i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i></button></td>
  `;
  tb.appendChild(tr);
}

function delPDRow(btn) {
  const row = btn.closest('tr'); row.remove();
  $('pdItemsTbody').querySelectorAll('tr').forEach((r,i) => r.cells[0].textContent = i+1);
  calcPDTotal();
}

function onPDPC(sel) {
  // Could auto-populate COA based on PC
}

function calcPDTotal() {
  let total = 0;
  $('pdItemsTbody').querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(row => {
    const cells = row.querySelectorAll('input[type=number]');
    const qty = parseFloat(cells[0].value)||0;
    const price = parseFloat(cells[1].value)||0;
    const amt = qty * price;
    row.querySelector('.pd-row-amt').textContent = rp(amt);
    total += amt;
  });
  $('pdTotalAmount').textContent = rp(total);
  $('pdTerbilang').textContent = terbilang(total);
  // Update approval flow based on amount
  const steps = getApprovalSteps('PD', session.dept, total);
  
  const pmSelect = $('pdCustomPm').value;
  const pmManual = $('pdCustomPmManual').value;
  const customPm = pmSelect === 'custom' ? pmManual : pmSelect;
  
  renderPaperSigGrid('pdSigGrid', {type:'PD', sigs:emptySignatures('PD', customPm), steps});
  renderApprovalFlow('pdApprovalFlow', steps.map((s,i)=> i===steps.length-1 ? s+' (Final Approval)' : s), []);
  return total;
}

   PR FORM
   ============================================== */
function initPRForm() {
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
  $('prDate').value = today;

function updatePRMeta() {
  const d = $('prDate').value;
  $('prDateDisplay').textContent = d ? new Date(d).toLocaleDateString('id-ID',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : '-';
  $('prDocNoDisplay').textContent = $('prDocNo').value || '-';
}

function addPRRow() {
  const tb = $('prItemsTbody');
  const n = tb.rows.length + 1;
  const coaOpts = DB.coas.map(c=>`<option value="${c.Code}">${c.Code}</option>`).join('');
  const tr = document.createElement('tr');
  tr.innerHTML = `
    <td class="td-num">${n}</td>
    <td><select style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10px;color:#111;background:transparent">${coaOpts}</select></td>
    <td><input type="text" placeholder="Part No" style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10.5px;color:#111"></td>
    <td><input type="text" placeholder="Deskripsi item..." style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10.5px;color:#111" oninput="calcPRTotal()"></td>
    <td><input type="number" value="1" min="1" style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10.5px;color:#111;text-align:right" oninput="calcPRTotal()"></td>
    <td><input type="text" value="Unit" style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10.5px;color:#111;text-align:center"></td>
    <td><input type="number" value="0" min="0" style="border:none;outline:none;width:100%;font-size:10.5px;color:#111;text-align:right" oninput="calcPRTotal()"></td>
    <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700" class="pr-row-tot">0</td>
    <td class="td-del"><button class="del-btn" onclick="delPRRow(this)"><i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i></button></td>
  `;
  tb.appendChild(tr);
}

function delPRRow(btn) {
  btn.closest('tr').remove();
  $('prItemsTbody').querySelectorAll('tr').forEach((r,i)=>r.cells[0].textContent=i+1);
  calcPRTotal();
}

function calcPRTotal() {
  let total = 0;
  $('prItemsTbody').querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(row => {
    const cells = row.querySelectorAll('input[type=number]');
    const qty = parseFloat(cells[0].value)||0;
    const price = parseFloat(cells[1].value)||0;
    const t = qty*price;
    row.querySelector('.pr-row-tot').textContent = rp(t);
    total += t;
  });
  $('prTotalAmount').textContent = rp(total);
  $('prTerbilang').textContent = terbilang(total);
  const steps = getApprovalSteps('PR', session.dept, total);
  renderPaperSigGrid('prSigGrid', {type:'PR', sigs:emptySignatures('PR'), steps});
  renderApprovalFlow('prApprovalFlow', steps.map((s,i)=>i===steps.length-1?s+' (Final Approval)':s), []);
  return total;
}

function emptySignatures(type, customPm) {
  const sigs = {
    user: { name: session.name, role: 'User', date: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'SUBMITTED', signatureText: session.signature || '' }
  };
  if (type === 'PD') {
    sigs.deptHeadPm = { name: '', role: 'Dept Head / PM', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
    sigs.projectManager = { name: customPm || 'Yohanes Sam', role: 'Project Manager / Operation Manager', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
    sigs.financeSite = { name: '', role: 'Finance Site', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
    sigs.costControl = { name: '', role: 'Cost Control', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
    sigs.accountingHO = { name: '', role: 'Accounting HO', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
    sigs.gmDept = { name: '', role: 'GM/CFO', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
    sigs.gmCfo = { name: '', role: 'COO', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
  } else {
    sigs.supervisor = { name: '', role: 'Supervisor', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
    sigs.finance = { name: '', role: 'Finance', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
    sigs.projectManager = { name: '', role: 'Project Manager', date: '', status: 'PENDING', signatureText: '' };
  }
  return sigs;
}

/* ==============================================
   PAPER SIGNATURE GRID & APPROVAL FLOW
   ============================================== */
function renderPaperSigGrid(containerId, {type, sigs, steps}) {
  const container = $(containerId);
  if (!container) return;
  
  container.removeAttribute('style');
  container.style.display = 'block';
  container.style.marginTop = '10px';
  container.style.marginBottom = '10px';

  const getSignerName = (key, defaultName) => {
    if (sigs && sigs[key] && sigs[key].name) return sigs[key].name;
    if (key === 'user') return session ? session.name : 'Muh Idul Adhan Yusuf';
    if (key === 'supervisor') {
      const dept = (sigs && sigs.user && sigs.user.dept) || (session ? session.dept : 'HRGA');
      const mapping = {
        'HRGA': 'Mona Asrani',
        'SHE': 'Rosmina Rabbang',
        'External': 'Erwin Eka',
        'QAQC': 'Yusril',
        'Engineering': 'Roymon Bionti',
        'Plant': 'Muh. Said',
        'Eksplorasi': 'La Ode Rusman'
      };
      return mapping[dept] || defaultName;
    }
    if (key === 'finance' || key === 'financeSite') {
      return 'Putri Amalia';
    }
    if (key === 'projectManager' || key === 'deptHeadPm') {
      return 'Rosalia Natalia';
    }
    return defaultName;
  };

  const getSigSpace = (key) => {
    const s = sigs[key] || {};
    const isApp = s.status === 'APPROVED' || s.status === 'SUBMITTED';
    const isRej = s.status === 'REJECTED';
    
    if (isApp) {
      if (s.signatureText && s.signatureText.indexOf('data:image') === 0) {
        return `<img src="${s.signatureText}" style="max-height:44px; max-width:90px; object-fit:contain;" />`;
      } else if (s.signature && s.signature.indexOf('data:image') === 0) {
        return `<img src="${s.signature}" style="max-height:44px; max-width:90px; object-fit:contain;" />`;
      } else {
        return genSVGSig(s.name).replace('stroke:var(--cy)','stroke:#1565c0');
      }
    } else if (isRej) {
      return '<span style="color:#ff1744; font-weight:bold; font-size:9px;">REJECTED</span>';
    }
    
    const signerName = getSignerName(key, '');
    const dbUser = DB.users.find(u => u.name === signerName);
    if (dbUser && dbUser.signature && dbUser.signature.indexOf('data:image') === 0) {
      return `<img src="${dbUser.signature}" style="max-height:44px; max-width:90px; object-fit:contain; opacity: 0.9;" />`;
    }
    
    return '<span style="color:#bbb;font-size:9px">____________________</span>';
  };

  if (type === 'PR') {
    const sigUser = getSigSpace('user');
    const sigSupervisor = getSigSpace('supervisor');
    const sigFinance = getSigSpace('finance');
    const sigApprovedPm = getSigSpace('projectManager');

    const nameUser = getSignerName('user', 'Muh Idul Adhan Yusuf');
    const nameSupervisor = getSignerName('supervisor', 'Mona Asrani');
    const nameFinance = getSignerName('finance', 'Putri Amalia');
    const nameApprovedPm = getSignerName('projectManager', 'Rosalia Natalia');

    container.innerHTML = `
      <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center; font-size:8px; border:1px solid #ddd; table-layout:fixed; background:#fff;">
        <thead>
          <tr style="background:#f5f5f5; font-weight:bold; color:#333;">
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 2px; width:25%;">DIBUAT OLEH</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 2px; width:25%;">DIVERIFIKASI OLEH</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 2px; width:25%;">DIVERIFIKASI OLEH</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 2px; width:25%;">DISETUJUI OLEH</th>
          </tr>
          <tr style="background:#fafafa; font-size:7.5px; color:#555;">
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px;">USER</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px;">SUPERVISOR</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px;">FINANCE</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px;">PROJECT MANAGER</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; height:50px; vertical-align:middle; padding:4px; background:#fff;">${sigUser}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; height:50px; vertical-align:middle; padding:4px; background:#fff;">${sigSupervisor}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; height:50px; vertical-align:middle; padding:4px; background:#fff;">${sigFinance}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; height:50px; vertical-align:middle; padding:4px; background:#fff;">${sigApprovedPm}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr style="font-weight:bold; font-size:8px; background:#fff; color:#111;">
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap;">${nameUser}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap;">${nameSupervisor}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap;">${nameFinance}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap;">${nameApprovedPm}</td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    `;
  } else {
    // PD Table (Fixed 3 Columns Workflow)
    const sigPrepared = getSigSpace('user');
    const sigVerified = getSigSpace('deptHeadPm');
    const sigApprovedCc = getSigSpace('financeSite');

    const namePrepared = getSignerName('user', 'Mona Asrani');
    const nameVerified = getSignerName('deptHeadPm', 'Rosalia Natalia');
    const nameApprovedCc = getSignerName('financeSite', 'Putri Amalia');

    container.innerHTML = `
      <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center; font-size:8px; border:1px solid #ddd; table-layout:fixed; background:#fff;">
        <thead>
          <tr style="background:#f5f5f5; font-weight:bold; color:#333;">
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 2px; width:33.33%;">DIBUAT OLEH</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 2px; width:33.33%;">DISETUJUI OLEH</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 2px; width:33.33%;">DIVERIFIKASI OLEH</th>
          </tr>
          <tr style="background:#fafafa; font-size:7.5px; color:#555;">
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px;">USER</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px;">DEPT HEAD DEPARTMENT / PROJECT MANAGER</th>
            <th style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px;">FINANCE SITE</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; height:50px; vertical-align:middle; padding:4px; background:#fff;">${sigPrepared}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; height:50px; vertical-align:middle; padding:4px; background:#fff;">${sigVerified}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; height:50px; vertical-align:middle; padding:4px; background:#fff;">${sigApprovedCc}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr style="font-weight:bold; font-size:8px; background:#fff; color:#111;">
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap;">${namePrepared}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap;">${nameVerified}</td>
            <td style="border:1px solid #ddd; padding:3px 2px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap;">${nameApprovedCc}</td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    `;
  }
}

function renderApprovalFlow(containerId, steps, completedSteps) {
  const container = $(containerId);
  if (!container) return;
  let html = `<div class="approval-flow-title"><b>ALUR APPROVAL</b></div><div class="af-steps">`;
  steps.forEach((step, i) => {
    const done = completedSteps.includes(i);
    const isActive = !done && completedSteps.length === i;
    html += `<div class="af-step">
      <div class="af-circle ${done?'done':isActive?'active':''}">${i+1}</div>
      <div class="af-step-name">${step}</div>
      <div class="af-step-stat ${done?'done':'pend'}">${done?'APPROVED':'PENDING'}</div>
    </div>`;
    if (i < steps.length - 1) html += `<div class="af-arrow">→</div>`;
  });
  // Final step
  html += `<div class="af-arrow">→</div><div class="af-step"><div class="af-circle ${completedSteps.length===steps.length?'done':''}">✓</div><div class="af-step-name">Selesai</div></div>`;
  html += `</div>`;

  // Info column
  html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:20px;margin-top:10px">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#333;margin-bottom:5px">Dokumen akan melalui alur approval berurutan:</div>
      ${steps.map(s=>`<div style="font-size:9px;color:#c8102e">• ${s}</div>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#333;margin-bottom:5px">Catatan:</div>
      <div style="font-size:8.5px;color:#555">• Data yang telah disubmit tidak dapat diubah</div>
      <div style="font-size:8.5px;color:#555">• Pastikan semua data telah benar sebelum submit</div>
      <div style="font-size:8.5px;color:#555">• Approval dilakukan secara berurutan</div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  container.innerHTML = html;
}

/* ==============================================
   SAVE DRAFT & SUBMIT
   ============================================== */
function genDocNo(type) {
  const cnt = DB.requests.filter(r=>r.type===type).length + DB.drafts.filter(d=>d.type===type).length + 1;
  const now = new Date();
  if (type === 'PD') {
    return String(cnt).padStart(3,'0') + '/' + session.dept.replace(/\s+/g,'') + '-BKU/' + ['I','II','III','IV','V','VI','VII','VIII','IX','X','XI','XII'][now.getMonth()] + '/' + now.getFullYear();
  }
  return type + '-' + now.getFullYear() + '-' + String(cnt).padStart(5,'0');
}

function saveDraft(type) {
  const subj = type === 'PD' ? $('pdSubj').value : $('prSubj').value;
  if (!subj.trim()) { toast('Isi Subject/Perihal terlebih dahulu!', true); return; }
  const draft = {
    id: 'DRF-' + Date.now(),
    type, subject: subj,
    docNo: type==='PD' ? $('pdDocNo').value : $('prDocNo').value,
    requester: session.name, saved: new Date().toLocaleString('id-ID')
  };
  DB.drafts.push(draft);
  toast('Draft berhasil disimpan: ' + draft.docNo);
}

function getFileData(input) {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    const file = input && input.files ? input.files[0] : null;
    if (!file) {
      resolve({ data: '', name: '' });
      return;
    }
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(e) {
      resolve({ data: e.target.result, name: file.name });
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}

function submitDoc(type) {
  const subj = type === 'PD' ? $('pdSubj').value : $('prSubj').value;
  const items = type === 'PD' ? getPDItems() : getPRItems();
  if (!subj.trim()) { toast('Isi Subject/Perihal terlebih dahulu!', true); return; }
  if (items.length === 0) { toast('Tambahkan minimal 1 item!', true); return; }
  const total = items.reduce((a,it)=>a+(it.amount||it.total||0),0);
  if (total === 0) { toast('Total nominal tidak boleh 0!', true); return; }

  const attachmentInput = type === 'PD' ? $('pdAttachmentFile') : $('prAttachmentFile');
  const budgetCaptureInput = type === 'PD' ? $('pdBudgetCaptureFile') : null;
  const userForValue = type === 'PD' ? $('pdUserFor').value : $('prUserFor').value;

  loader(true);
  
  Promise.all([
    getFileData(attachmentInput),
    getFileData(budgetCaptureInput)
  ]).then(([attInfo, bgtInfo]) => {
    setTimeout(() => {
      const docNo = type==='PD' ? $('pdDocNo').value : $('prDocNo').value;
      const steps = getApprovalSteps(type, session.dept, total);
      
      let customPm = 'Yohanes Sam';
      if (type === 'PD') {
        const pmSelect = $('pdCustomPm').value;
        const pmManual = $('pdCustomPmManual').value;
        customPm = pmSelect === 'custom' ? pmManual : pmSelect;
      }
      
      const req = {
        id: 'REQ-' + Date.now(),
        type, docNumber: docNo,
        date: (type==='PD'?$('pdDate'):$('prDate')).value,
        dept: session.dept,
        priority: (type==='PD'?$('pdPrio'):$('prPrio')).value,
        subject: subj,
        requester: session.name, reqId: session.id,
        nominal: total, status: 'Pending',
        currentApprover: steps[0],
        userFor: userForValue,
        attachment: attInfo.data,
        attachmentName: attInfo.name,
        budgetCapture: bgtInfo.data,
        items,
        sigs: emptySignatures(type, customPm)
      };
      DB.requests.unshift(req);
      DB.logs.unshift({
        ts: new Date().toLocaleString('id-ID'), 
        user: session.name, 
        act: 'Submit ' + type, 
        mod: 'Requests', 
        doc: docNo, 
        ip: '192.168.10.' + Math.floor(Math.random()*200+10)
      });
      loader(false);
      
      // Reset inputs & previews
      if (attachmentInput) attachmentInput.value = '';
      if (budgetCaptureInput) {
        budgetCaptureInput.value = '';
        const previewCont = $('pd-budget-capture-local-preview-container');
        if (previewCont) previewCont.style.display = 'none';
        const previewImg = $('pd-budget-capture-local-preview');
        if (previewImg) previewImg.src = '';
      }
      const userForInput = type === 'PD' ? $('pdUserFor') : $('prUserFor');
      if (userForInput) userForInput.value = '';

      updatePendingBadge();
      toast('Berhasil disubmit! No: ' + docNo + ' – Menunggu alur approval dari ' + steps[0]);
      nav('history');
    }, 600);
  });
}


function getPDItems() {
  const rows = $('pdItemsTbody').querySelectorAll('tr');
  const items = [];
  rows.forEach(row => {
    const cells = row.querySelectorAll('input[type=number]');
    const qty = parseFloat(cells[0].value)||0, price = parseFloat(cells[1].value)||0;
    const texts = row.querySelectorAll('input[type=text]');
    items.push({
      PC: texts[0] ? texts[0].value.trim() : '', 
      DR: texts[1] ? texts[1].value.trim() : '',
      desc: texts[2] ? texts[2].value : '', 
      qty, 
      price, 
      amount: qty*price,
      info: texts[3] ? texts[3].value : ''
    });
  });
  return items.filter(it => it.desc && it.amount > 0);
}

function getPRItems() {
  const rows = $('prItemsTbody').querySelectorAll('tr');
  const items = [];
  rows.forEach(row => {
    const numInputs = row.querySelectorAll('input[type=number]');
    const txtInputs = row.querySelectorAll('input[type=text]');
    const selects = row.querySelectorAll('select');
    const qty = parseFloat(numInputs[0].value)||0, price = parseFloat(numInputs[1].value)||0;
    items.push({
      coa: selects[0].value, partNo: txtInputs[0].value,
      desc: txtInputs[1].value, qty,
      uom: txtInputs[2] ? txtInputs[2].value : 'Unit',
      price, total: qty*price
    });
  });
  return items.filter(it => it.desc && it.total > 0);
}

/* ============================================================
   BUILD PAPER HTML
   ============================================================ */
function buildPaperHTML(doc) {
  const sigs = doc.sigs;
  
  const formatDate = function(dateStr) {
    if (!dateStr) return '-';
    const d = new Date(dateStr);
    return d.toLocaleDateString('id-ID', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' });
  };
  
  const formatCurrency = function(num) {
    return "Rp " + new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format(num || 0);
  };
  
  const terbilangText = terbilang(doc.nominal);
  
  const getSignerName = (role, dept, defaultName) => {
    const u = DB.users.find(u => u.role === role && (dept ? u.dept === dept : true));
    return u ? u.name : defaultName;
  };

  const getSigBoxData = function(sigObj, roleKey) {
    let sigContent = '';
    let name = (sigObj && sigObj.name) ? sigObj.name : '-';
    let date = '';
    let statusClass = 'pend';
    let statusText = 'PENDING';
    
    if (sigObj && (sigObj.status === 'SUBMITTED' || sigObj.status === 'APPROVED')) {
      date = formatDate(sigObj.date);
      statusClass = 'app';
      statusText = sigObj.status === 'SUBMITTED' ? 'SUBMITTED' : 'APPROVED';
      if (sigObj.signatureText && sigObj.signatureText.indexOf('data:image') === 0) {
        sigContent = '<img src="' + sigObj.signatureText + '" style="max-height:40px; max-width:110px; object-fit:contain;" />';
      } else if (sigObj.signature && sigObj.signature.indexOf('data:image') === 0) {
        sigContent = '<img src="' + sigObj.signature + '" style="max-height:40px; max-width:110px; object-fit:contain;" />';
      } else {
        sigContent = genSVGSig(sigObj.name).replace('class="esig"','style="width:110px;height:38px"').replace('stroke:var(--cy)','stroke:#1565c0');
      }
    } else if (sigObj && sigObj.status === 'REJECTED') {
      date = formatDate(sigObj.date);
      statusClass = 'rej';
      statusText = 'REJECTED';
      sigContent = '<span style="color:#ff1744; font-weight:bold; font-size:9px;">REJECTED</span>';
    } else if (roleKey) {
      // Fallback signature image lookup from DB.users for visual match
      const signerName = name !== '-' ? name : getSignerName(roleKey, '', '');
      const dbUser = DB.users.find(u => u.name === signerName);
      if (dbUser && dbUser.signature && dbUser.signature.indexOf('data:image') === 0) {
        sigContent = '<img src="' + dbUser.signature + '" style="max-height:40px; max-width:110px; object-fit:contain; opacity:0.9;" />';
      }
    }
    
    return {
      content: sigContent,
      name: name,
      date: date,
      statusText: statusText,
      statusClass: statusClass
    };
  };

  if (doc.type === 'PR') {
    // ==========================================
    // PURCHASE REQUEST PDF TEMPLATE
    // ==========================================
    let itemsRowsHTML = '';
    doc.items.forEach(function(item, idx) {
      itemsRowsHTML += '<tr>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:5px; text-align:center;">' + (idx + 1) + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:5px; text-align:center; font-weight:bold;">' + (item.coa || item.COA || '-') + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:5px; text-align:center;">' + (item.partNo || item.PartNumber || '-') + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:5px;">' + (item.desc || item.Description || '-') + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:5px; text-align:center;">' + (item.costElement || item.CostElement || '-') + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:5px; text-align:center; font-weight:bold;">' + (item.qty || item.Quantity || 0) + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:5px; text-align:center;">' + (item.uom || item.UoM || 'Unit') + '</td>' +
        '</tr>';
    });
    
    const isStock = doc.inventoryType === 'STOCK' ? '&#10003;' : '&nbsp;&nbsp;';
    const isNonStock = doc.inventoryType === 'NON STOCK' || !doc.inventoryType ? '&#10003;' : '&nbsp;&nbsp;';
    
    const sigUser = getSigBoxData(sigs.user, 'user');
    const sigHead = getSigBoxData(sigs.supervisor || sigs.headDept, 'supervisor');
    const sigFin = getSigBoxData(sigs.finance, 'finance');
    const sigPm = getSigBoxData(sigs.projectManager, 'projectManager');
    
    const getPRSupervisor = (dept) => {
      const mapping = {
        'HRGA': 'Mona Asrani',
        'SHE': 'Rosmina Rabbang',
        'External': 'Erwin Eka',
        'QAQC': 'Yusril',
        'Engineering': 'Roymon Biang',
        'Plant': 'Muh. Said',
        'Eksplorasi': 'Laode Rusman',
        'Exploration': 'Laode Rusman'
      };
      return mapping[dept] || '';
    };

    if (sigUser.name === '-') sigUser.name = doc.requester || (session ? session.name : 'Mona Asrani');
    if (sigHead.name === '-') sigHead.name = getPRSupervisor(doc.dept || 'HRGA') || getSignerName('Supervisor', doc.dept || 'HRGA', 'Mona Asrani');
    if (sigFin.name === '-') sigFin.name = 'Putri Amalia';
    if (sigPm.name === '-') sigPm.name = 'Rosalia Natalia';
    
    return `
      <style>
        @media print {
          @page { size: A4 portrait; margin: 0; }
          body { margin: 0; padding: 8mm; }
        }
        .page-break-preview {
          page-break-before: always;
        }
        @media screen {
          .page-break-preview {
            border-top: 2px dashed #cbd5e1;
            margin-top: 30px !important;
            padding-top: 15px !important;
            position: relative;
            page-break-before: auto;
          }
          .page-break-preview::before {
            content: "HALAMAN BARU / NEW PAGE (LAMPIRAN)";
            position: absolute;
            top: -10px;
            left: 20px;
            background: #fff;
            padding: 0 8px;
            font-size: 8px;
            color: #64748b;
            font-weight: bold;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
          }
        }
      </style>
      <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif; background:#fff; color:#111; padding:15px; font-size:9.5px; border:1.5px solid #111; box-sizing:border-box; max-width:800px; margin:0 auto;">
        <!-- Header -->
        <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; border:1.5px solid #111; margin-bottom:12px; background-color:#e0e0e0;">
          <tr>
            <td style="width:15%; text-align:center; border:1.5px solid #111; padding:6px; vertical-align:middle;">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="max-height:100px; max-width:100%; object-fit:contain;" />
            </td>
            <td style="width:50%; border:1.5px solid #111; padding:6px 12px; vertical-align:middle; text-align:left;">
              <div style="font-size:14px; font-weight:bold; color:#000; line-height:1.2; font-family:Arial, sans-serif;">PT. BHUMI KARYA UTAMA</div>
              <div style="font-size:9px; color:#000; margin-top:4px; line-height:1.3; font-family:Arial, sans-serif;">
                Jl. Pluit Permai No. 12B  RT 01 RW 07 Pluit, Kec. Penjaringan - Jakarta Utara 14450
              </div>
              <div style="font-size:9px; color:#000; margin-top:2px; line-height:1.3; font-family:Arial, sans-serif;">
                Tlp : 021-26063593 / Fax : 021-26063591
              </div>
            </td>
            <td style="width:35%; text-align:center; border:1.5px solid #111; padding:6px; vertical-align:middle;">
              <div style="font-size:14px; font-weight:bold; color:#000; line-height:1.2; font-family:Arial, sans-serif;">PR</div>
              <div style="font-size:14px; font-weight:bold; color:#000; margin-top:4px; line-height:1.2; font-family:Arial, sans-serif;">PURCHASE REQUEST</div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </table>
        
        <!-- Info Metadata Table -->
        <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; border:1px solid #111; margin-bottom:12px;">
          <tr>
            <td style="width:35%; border:1px solid #111; padding:0; vertical-align:top;">
              <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse;">
                <tr><td style="font-weight:bold; color:#444; background:#f5f5f5; width:75px; border-right:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 6px; border-bottom:1px solid #111;">PR No.</td><td style="border-bottom:1px solid #111; padding:4px; font-weight:bold;">${doc.docNumber}</td></tr>
                <tr><td style="font-weight:bold; color:#444; background:#f5f5f5; width:75px; border-right:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 6px; border-bottom:1px solid #111;">PR Date</td><td style="border-bottom:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${formatDate(doc.date)}</td></tr>
                <tr><td style="font-weight:bold; color:#444; background:#f5f5f5; width:75px; border-right:1px solid #ddd; padding:4px 6px;">Department</td><td style="padding:4px;">${doc.dept}</td></tr>
              </table>
            </td>
            <td style="width:18%; text-align:center; border:1px solid #111; padding:0; vertical-align:top;">
              <div style="background:#f5f5f5; border-bottom:1px solid #111; padding:4px; font-weight:bold;">Priority</div>
              <div style="padding:12px 4px; font-size:11px; font-weight:bold; color:#c8102e;">${doc.priority || 'P2'}</div>
            </td>
            <td style="width:22%; border:1px solid #111; padding:0; vertical-align:top;">
              <div style="background:#f5f5f5; border-bottom:1px solid #111; padding:4px; font-weight:bold; text-align:center;">Inventory Type</div>
              <div style="padding:8px 10px; line-height:1.5;">
                <div><span style="display:inline-block; width:10px; height:10px; border:1px solid #111; margin-right:4px; text-align:center; line-height:9px; font-size:8px; font-weight:bold;">${isStock}</span> STOCK</div>
                <div style="margin-top:3px;"><span style="display:inline-block; width:10px; height:10px; border:1px solid #111; margin-right:4px; text-align:center; line-height:9px; font-size:8px; font-weight:bold;">${isNonStock}</span> NON STOCK</div>
              </div>
            </td>
            <td style="width:25%; text-align:center; border:1px solid #111; padding:0; vertical-align:top;">
              <div style="background:#f5f5f5; border-bottom:1px solid #111; padding:4px; font-weight:bold;">Purchase Category</div>
              <div style="padding:12px 4px; font-weight:bold;">${doc.purchaseCategory || 'Office Equipment'}</div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </table>
        
        <!-- Items Table -->
        <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; border:1px solid #111; margin-bottom:12px; font-size:9px;">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th style="background:#f5f5f5; color:#111; padding:5px; font-weight:bold; text-align:center; border:1px solid #111; text-transform:uppercase;">No.</th>
              <th style="background:#f5f5f5; color:#111; padding:5px; font-weight:bold; text-align:center; border:1px solid #111; text-transform:uppercase;">COA</th>
              <th style="background:#f5f5f5; color:#111; padding:5px; font-weight:bold; text-align:center; border:1px solid #111; text-transform:uppercase;">Part Number</th>
              <th style="background:#f5f5f5; color:#111; padding:5px; font-weight:bold; text-align:center; border:1px solid #111; text-transform:uppercase;">Description</th>
              <th style="background:#f5f5f5; color:#111; padding:5px; font-weight:bold; text-align:center; border:1px solid #111; text-transform:uppercase;">Cost Element</th>
              <th style="background:#f5f5f5; color:#111; padding:5px; font-weight:bold; text-align:center; border:1px solid #111; text-transform:uppercase;">Quantity</th>
              <th style="background:#f5f5f5; color:#111; padding:5px; font-weight:bold; text-align:center; border:1px solid #111; text-transform:uppercase;">UoM</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            ${itemsRowsHTML}
          </tbody>
        </table>
        
        <!-- User For Box -->
        <div style="border:1px solid #111; padding:8px; margin-bottom:12px; background-color:#FFFF00;">
          <strong>User For:</strong><br>
          <div style="margin-top:4px; color:#333;">${doc.userFor || '-'}</div>
        </div>

        
        <div style="font-size:7.5px; color:#666; margin-bottom:12px; font-style:italic;">* Untuk menghindari kesalahan, harap menggunakan bahasa umum yang mudah dimengerti dan menyertakan spesifikasi yang lengkap disertai gambar atau contoh barang</div>
        
        <!-- Signatures Grid -->
        <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center; font-size:9px; margin-top:15px;">
          <thead>
            <tr style="background:#f5f5f5; font-weight:bold;">
              <th style="width:25%; border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">DIBUAT OLEH</th>
              <th style="width:25%; border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">DIVERIFIKASI OLEH</th>
              <th style="width:25%; border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">DIVERIFIKASI OLEH</th>
              <th style="width:25%; border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">DISETUJUI OLEH</th>
            </tr>
            <tr style="background:#f9f9f9; font-size:8px;">
              <th style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">USER</th>
              <th style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">SUPERVISOR</th>
              <th style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">FINANCE</th>
              <th style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">PROJECT MANAGER</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr>
              <td style="height:52px; vertical-align:middle; border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigUser.content}</td>
              <td style="height:52px; vertical-align:middle; border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigHead.content}</td>
              <td style="height:52px; vertical-align:middle; border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigFin.content}</td>
              <td style="height:52px; vertical-align:middle; border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigPm.content}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr style="font-weight:bold; font-size:8.5px;">
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigUser.name}</td>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigHead.name}</td>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigFin.name}</td>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigPm.name}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;"><span class="status-pill ${sigUser.statusClass}">${sigUser.statusText}</span></td>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;"><span class="status-pill ${sigHead.statusClass}">${sigHead.statusText}</span></td>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;"><span class="status-pill ${sigFin.statusClass}">${sigFin.statusText}</span></td>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;"><span class="status-pill ${sigPm.statusClass}">${sigPm.statusText}</span></td>
            </tr>
            <tr style="font-size:7.5px; color:#555;">
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigUser.date || '-'}</td>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigHead.date || '-'}</td>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigFin.date || '-'}</td>
              <td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">${sigPm.date || '-'}</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
        
        ${doc.attachment ? `
          <div class="page-break-preview" style="border:1px solid #111; padding:8px; margin-top:20px;">
            <div style="font-weight:bold; font-size:10px; border-bottom:1px solid #111; padding-bottom:3px; margin-bottom:5px; text-transform:uppercase;">Lampiran / Attachments:</div>
            ${doc.attachment.indexOf('data:application/pdf') === 0 || doc.attachment.toLowerCase().indexOf('.pdf') !== -1 || (doc.attachmentName && doc.attachmentName.toLowerCase().indexOf('.pdf') !== -1) ? 
              (doc.attachment.indexOf('data:application/pdf') === 0 ? 
                `<div class="pdf-rendering-container" data-pdf="${doc.attachment}" style="text-align:center; padding:10px;">Mengurai halaman PDF...</div>` :
                `<div style="padding:10px;"><a href="${doc.attachment}" target="_blank" style="color:#1565c0; text-decoration:underline; font-weight:bold;"><i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"></i> Buka Lampiran PDF (${doc.attachmentName || 'File'})</a></div>`
              ) :
              (doc.attachment.indexOf('data:image') === 0 || doc.attachment.match(/\.(jpeg|jpg|gif|png|webp|svg)/i) || (doc.attachmentName && doc.attachmentName.match(/\.(jpeg|jpg|gif|png|webp|svg)/i)) ? 
                `<div style="text-align:center; padding:10px;"><img src="${doc.attachment}" style="width:100%; max-width:100%; height:auto; object-fit:contain;" /></div>` : 
                `<div style="padding:10px;"><a href="${doc.attachment}" target="_blank" download="${doc.attachmentName || 'lampiran'}" style="color:#1565c0; text-decoration:underline; font-weight:bold;">Unduh Lampiran (${doc.attachmentName || 'File'})</a></div>`
              )
            }
          </div>
        ` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
  } else {
    // ==========================================
    // PERMOHONAN DANA (PD) PDF TEMPLATE
    // ==========================================
    let itemsRowsHTML = '';
    doc.items.forEach(function(item, idx) {
      itemsRowsHTML += '<tr>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px; text-align:center;">' + (idx + 1) + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px; text-align:center; font-weight:bold;">' + (item.PC || item.COA || item.coa || '-') + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px; text-align:center;">' + (item.DR || item.CostElement || item.costElement || '-') + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">' + (item.desc || item.Description || '-') + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px; text-align:center;">' + (item.qty || item.Quantity || 1) + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px; text-align:right;">' + formatCurrency(item.price || item.Price || 0).substring(3) + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px; text-align:right; font-weight:bold;">' + formatCurrency(item.amount || item.Total || 0).substring(3) + '</td>' +
        '<td style="border:1px solid #111; padding:4px;">' + (item.info || doc.userFor || '-') + '</td>' +
        '</tr>';
    });
    
    // Simulate budget check for specific department
    const deptBudget = DB.budgets.find(b => b.Dept === doc.dept);
    const brPC = deptBudget ? (deptBudget.Project || 'BHL.22.105.001') : 'BHL.22.105.001';
    const brDR = deptBudget ? (deptBudget.Dept || 'TOB3,CE0831,LM001,LA01') : 'TOB3,CE0831,LM001,LA01';
    const annualLimit = deptBudget ? (parseFloat(deptBudget.Annual) || 10000000) : 10000000;
    const actualSpent = deptBudget ? (parseFloat(deptBudget.Actual) || 1650000) : 1650000;
    const budgetAvail = annualLimit - actualSpent;
    const budgetVariant = budgetAvail - doc.nominal;
    const brVariantColor = budgetVariant >= 0 ? '#2e7d32' : '#c62828';
    
    const sigPrepared = getSigBoxData(sigs.user, 'user');
    const sigVerified = getSigBoxData(sigs.deptHeadPm, 'headDept');
    const sigApprovedPm = getSigBoxData(sigs.projectManager, 'projectManager');

            ${doc.attachment.indexOf('data:application/pdf') === 0 || doc.attachment.toLowerCase().indexOf('.pdf') !== -1 || (doc.attachmentName && doc.attachmentName.toLowerCase().indexOf('.pdf') !== -1) ?

              ) :
