function previewPDF(type) {
  // Build a temp doc object from current form values
  const total = type === 'PD' ? calcPDTotal() : calcPRTotal();
  const attachmentInput = type === 'PD' ? $('pdAttachmentFile') : $('prAttachmentFile');
  const budgetCaptureInput = type === 'PD' ? $('pdBudgetCaptureFile') : null;
  const userForValue = type === 'PD' ? $('pdUserFor').value : $('prUserFor').value;

  loader(true);
  Promise.all([
    getFileData(attachmentInput),
    getFileData(budgetCaptureInput)
  ]).then(([attInfo, bgtInfo]) => {
    loader(false);
    const docObj = {
      type,
      docNumber: type==='PD' ? $('pdDocNo').value : $('prDocNo').value,
      date: type==='PD' ? $('pdDate').value : $('prDate').value,
      dept: session.dept,
      priority: type==='PD' ? $('pdPrio').value : $('prPrio').value,
      subject: type==='PD' ? $('pdSubj').value : $('prSubj').value,
      userFor: userForValue,
      requester: session.name,
      nominal: total,
      attachment: attInfo.data,
      attachmentName: attInfo.name,
      budgetCapture: bgtInfo.data,
      items: type==='PD' ? getPDItems() : getPRItems(),
      sigs: emptySignatures()
    };
    openPDFModal(docObj);
  });
}

function previewPDFModal() {
  if (activeReview) openPDFModal(activeReview);
}

function openPDFModal(doc) {
  activePDFDoc = doc;
  $('pdfModalTitle').textContent = doc.docNumber + ' (' + doc.type + ')';
  const previewArea = $('pdfPreviewArea');
  if (doc.type === 'PD') {
    previewArea.style.maxWidth = '1080px';
  } else {
    previewArea.style.maxWidth = '800px';
  }
  previewArea.innerHTML = buildPaperHTML(doc);
  $('pdfModal').classList.add('open');
  
  // Render PDF attachment to canvases
  const pdfContainers = previewArea.querySelectorAll('.pdf-rendering-container');
  pdfContainers.forEach(container => {
    const base64 = container.getAttribute('data-pdf');
    if (base64) {
      renderPDFToCanvases(base64, container);
    }
  });
}

function closePDFModal() { $('pdfModal').classList.remove('open'); }

function doPrint() {
  if (!activePDFDoc) return;
  const html = buildPaperHTML(activePDFDoc);
  const orientation = activePDFDoc.type === 'PD' ? 'landscape' : 'portrait';
  const printWin = window.open('', '_blank', 'width=1000,height=1000');
  printWin.document.write(`<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>${activePDFDoc.docNumber}</title>
    <style>
      body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;margin:0;color:#111}
      @page { size: ${orientation}; margin: 5mm; }
      @media print{body{margin:0}}
    </style>
  </head><body>${html}</body></html>`);
  printWin.document.close();
  setTimeout(() => { printWin.focus(); printWin.print(); }, 500);
}

function downloadPDFOffline() {
  if (!activePDFDoc) return;
  
  const targetWidth = activePDFDoc.type === 'PD' ? 1080 : 800;

  // Temporarily force body/html overflow and widths to prevent layout folding and clipping
  const origBodyOverflow = document.body.style.overflow;
  const origBodyOverflowX = document.body.style.overflowX;
  const origHtmlOverflow = document.documentElement.style.overflow;
  const origHtmlOverflowX = document.documentElement.style.overflowX;
  const origBodyWidth = document.body.style.width;
  const origBodyMinWidth = document.body.style.minWidth;
  const origHtmlWidth = document.documentElement.style.width;
  const origHtmlMinWidth = document.documentElement.style.minWidth;
  
  document.body.style.overflow = 'visible';
  document.body.style.overflowX = 'visible';
  document.documentElement.style.overflow = 'visible';
  document.documentElement.style.overflowX = 'visible';
  document.body.style.width = targetWidth + 'px';
  document.body.style.minWidth = targetWidth + 'px';
  document.documentElement.style.width = targetWidth + 'px';
  document.documentElement.style.minWidth = targetWidth + 'px';
  
  // Create a hidden parent wrapper at (0,0) with proper layout width to prevent content folding
  const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
  wrapper.style.position = 'absolute';
  wrapper.style.left = '0';
  wrapper.style.top = '0';
  wrapper.style.width = targetWidth + 'px';
  wrapper.style.height = 'auto';
  wrapper.style.overflow = 'visible';
  wrapper.style.zIndex = '-9999';
  wrapper.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
  
  // Create the clean container to be captured
  const container = document.createElement('div');
  container.style.width = targetWidth + 'px';
  container.style.background = '#fff';
  container.innerHTML = buildPaperHTML(activePDFDoc);
  
  wrapper.appendChild(container);
  document.body.appendChild(wrapper);
  
  const orientation = activePDFDoc.type === 'PD' ? 'landscape' : 'portrait';
  const opt = {
    filename: activePDFDoc.docNumber.replace(/\//g, '_') + '.pdf'
  };
  
  loader(true);
  const pdfContainers = container.querySelectorAll('.pdf-rendering-container');
  const promises = [];
  pdfContainers.forEach(c => {
    const base64 = c.getAttribute('data-pdf');
    if (base64) {
      promises.push(renderPDFToCanvases(base64, c));
    }
  });

  Promise.all(promises).then(() => {
    const isPD = activePDFDoc.type === 'PD';
    const attachmentContainer = container.querySelector('.page-break-preview');
    const hasAttachment = !!attachmentContainer;
    
    if (hasAttachment) {
      // Temporarily hide attachment so it doesn't render on the main page canvas
      attachmentContainer.style.display = 'none';
    }
    
    // Always render the main container first
    const renderTarget = container;
    
    html2canvas(renderTarget, {
      scale: 2,
      useCORS: true,
      width: targetWidth,
      windowWidth: targetWidth
    }).then(function(canvas) {
      if (hasAttachment) {
        attachmentContainer.style.display = 'block';
      }
      
      const pdfOrientation = isPD ? 'landscape' : 'portrait';
      const a4W = isPD ? 297 : 210;
      
      const jsPDFClass = (window.jspdf && window.jspdf.jsPDF) || window.jsPDF;
      const pdf = new jsPDFClass({
        orientation: pdfOrientation,
        unit: 'mm',
        format: 'a4'
      });
      
      const marginMm = 8;
      const printableW = a4W - (marginMm * 2);
      const ratio = canvas.width / canvas.height;
      const imgH = printableW / ratio;
      
      pdf.addImage(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.98), 'JPEG', marginMm, marginMm, printableW, imgH);
      
      if (hasAttachment) {
        const canvases = attachmentContainer.querySelectorAll('canvas');
        if (canvases.length > 0) {
          canvases.forEach(function(c) {
            const pOri = 'portrait';
            const pw = 210 - (marginMm * 2);
            const r = c.width / c.height;
            const ph = pw / r;
            pdf.addPage('a4', pOri);
            pdf.addImage(c.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.95), 'JPEG', marginMm, marginMm, pw, ph);
          });
          pdf.save(opt.filename);
          cleanup();
        } else {
          attachmentContainer.style.width = '800px';
          attachmentContainer.style.margin = '0 auto';
          
          html2canvas(attachmentContainer, {
            scale: 2,
            useCORS: true,
            width: 800,
            windowWidth: 800
          }).then(function(attachCanvas) {
            const pOri = 'portrait';
            const pw = 210 - (marginMm * 2);
            const r = attachCanvas.width / attachCanvas.height;
            const ph = pw / r;
            pdf.addPage('a4', pOri);
            pdf.addImage(attachCanvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.95), 'JPEG', marginMm, marginMm, pw, ph);
            pdf.save(opt.filename);
            cleanup();
          }).catch(handlePdfError);
        }
      } else {
        pdf.save(opt.filename);
        cleanup();
      }
    }).catch(handlePdfError);
    
    function cleanup() {
      loader(false);
      restoreStyles();
    }
    
    function restoreStyles() {
      if (wrapper.parentNode) {
        wrapper.parentNode.removeChild(wrapper);
      }
      document.body.style.overflow = origBodyOverflow;
      document.body.style.overflowX = origBodyOverflowX;
      document.documentElement.style.overflow = origHtmlOverflow;
      document.documentElement.style.overflowX = origHtmlOverflowX;
      document.body.style.width = origBodyWidth;
      document.body.style.minWidth = origBodyMinWidth;
      document.documentElement.style.width = origHtmlWidth;
      document.documentElement.style.minWidth = origHtmlMinWidth;
    }
    
    function handlePdfError(err) {
      console.error(err);
      loader(false);
      restoreStyles();
      alert("Gagal memproses PDF: " + err.toString());
    }
  }).catch((err) => {
    console.error(err);
    loader(false);
    if (wrapper.parentNode) {
      wrapper.parentNode.removeChild(wrapper);
    }
    document.body.style.overflow = origBodyOverflow;
    document.body.style.overflowX = origBodyOverflowX;
    document.documentElement.style.overflow = origHtmlOverflow;
    document.documentElement.style.overflowX = origHtmlOverflowX;
    document.body.style.width = origBodyWidth;
    document.body.style.minWidth = origBodyMinWidth;
    document.documentElement.style.width = origHtmlWidth;
    document.documentElement.style.minWidth = origHtmlMinWidth;
    alert("Gagal memproses PDF: " + err.toString());
  });
}

function downloadODF() {
  if (!activePDFDoc) return;
  const doc = activePDFDoc;
  const wsData = [];
  
  // Company Information
  wsData.push(["BARA INDAH SINERGI GROUP"]);
  wsData.push(["PT. BHUMI KARYA UTAMA"]);
  wsData.push([]);
  wsData.push(["FORMULIR PERMOHONAN DANA (PD)"]);
  wsData.push([]);
  
  // Header Metadata
  wsData.push(["No Dokumen:", doc.docNumber]);
  wsData.push(["Tanggal:", doc.date]);
  wsData.push(["Department:", doc.dept]);
  wsData.push(["Subject:", doc.subject]);
  wsData.push(["Prioritas:", doc.priority]);
  wsData.push(["Kebutuhan Detail (User For):", doc.userFor || '-']);
  wsData.push([]);
  
  // Table Header & Rows
  if (doc.type === 'PR') {
    wsData.push(["NO", "COA", "Part Number", "Description", "Cost Element", "Quantity", "UoM"]);
    doc.items.forEach((it, idx) => {
      wsData.push([idx + 1, it.coa || it.COA || '', it.partNo || it.PartNumber || '', it.desc || it.Description || '', it.costElement || it.CostElement || '', it.qty || it.Quantity || 0, it.uom || it.UoM || 'Unit']);
    });
  } else {
    wsData.push(["NO", "PC (Project Code)", "DR (Distribution Rules)", "Description", "QTY", "Price", "Amount (IDR)", "Information"]);
    doc.items.forEach((it, idx) => {
      wsData.push([idx + 1, it.PC || '', it.DR || '', it.desc || '', it.qty || 1, it.price || 0, it.amount || 0, it.info || '']);
    });
    wsData.push([]);
    wsData.push(["Total Permohonan Dana:", "", "", "", "", "", doc.nominal]);
    wsData.push(["Terbilang:", terbilang(doc.nominal) + " rupiah"]);
  }
  
  wsData.push([]);
  
  // Signatures Status
  wsData.push(["Workflow Approval Signatures Status:"]);
  const keyMap = {'Supervisor':'headDept','Head Department':'headDept','Finance':'finance','Project Manager':'projectManager','Cost Control':'costControl','GM/CFO':'gmCfo'};
  const steps = getApprovalSteps(doc.type, doc.dept, doc.nominal);
  const allSteps = [{ label:'Prepared By (USER)', name: doc.requester }, ...steps.map(s => {
    const k = keyMap[s];
    const sig = doc.sigs[k] || {};
    return { label: s, name: sig.name || 'PENDING' };
  })];
  
  allSteps.forEach(step => {
    wsData.push([step.label + ":", step.name]);
  });

  // Build SheetJS Workbook
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(wsData);
  
  // Styling column widths
  const wscols = [
    {wch: 25},
    {wch: 30},
    {wch: 25},
    {wch: 40},
    {wch: 15},
    {wch: 15},
    {wch: 15},
    {wch: 30}
  ];
  ws['!cols'] = wscols;

  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, doc.type + " Data");
  
  // Save Workbook
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, doc.docNumber.replace(/\//g, '_') + '.ods', { bookType: 'ods' });
  toast('Dokumen ODF (.ods) berhasil diunduh.');
}

/* ==============================================
   APPROVAL CENTER
   ============================================== */
function loadApproval() {
  const role = session.role;
  $('approvalRoleLabel').textContent = role;
  document.querySelectorAll('#approvalTabs .tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.getAttribute('data-role') === role));
  const isPmLeave = isPMOnLeave();
  const list = DB.requests.filter(r => 
    r.status === 'Pending' && 
    (r.currentApprover === role || (role === 'KTT' && isPmLeave && r.currentApprover === 'Project Manager'))
  );
  const tb = $('approvalTbody'); tb.innerHTML = '';
  if (!list.length) {
    tb.innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="9" style="text-align:center;padding:20px">Tidak ada dokumen menunggu approval dari <b>${role}</b></td></tr>`;
    return;
  }
  list.forEach((r, i) => {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML = `<td>${i+1}</td><td><span class="pill p-${r.type.toLowerCase()}">${r.type}</span></td>
      <td><a style="color:var(--cy);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600" onclick="openReview('${r.id}')">${r.docNumber}</a></td>
      <td>${r.subject.slice(0,42)}</td><td>${r.requester}</td><td>${r.date}</td>
      <td style="font-weight:700;color:var(--cy)">${rpFull(r.nominal)}</td>
      <td><span class="pill p-pending">Pending</span></td>
      <td><button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openReview('${r.id}')"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Review</button></td>`;
    tb.appendChild(tr);
  });
}

function openReview(id) {
  const doc = DB.requests.find(r => r.id === id);
  if (!doc) return;
  activeReview = doc;
  $('mdocNum').textContent = doc.docNumber + ' (' + doc.type + ')';
  $('mReq').textContent = doc.requester + ' / ' + doc.dept;
  $('mDate').textContent = doc.date + ' | Priority: ' + doc.priority;
  $('mTotal').textContent = rpFull(doc.nominal);
  $('mSubj').textContent = doc.subject;

  const tb = $('mItemsTbody'); tb.innerHTML = '';
  doc.items.forEach((it, i) => {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    const amt = it.amount || it.total || 0;
    const price = it.price || 0;
    const qty = it.qty || 0;
    const pc = it.PC || it.coa || '-';
    tr.innerHTML = `<td>${i+1}</td><td>${pc}</td><td>${it.desc}</td><td>${qty}</td><td>${it.uom||'Lot'}</td><td>${rpFull(price)}</td><td style="font-weight:700">${rpFull(amt)}</td>`;
    tb.appendChild(tr);
  });

  // Render signature row
  const sigRow = $('mSigRow'); sigRow.innerHTML = '';
  const steps = getApprovalSteps(doc.type, doc.dept, doc.nominal);
  const keyMap = {'Supervisor':'headDept','Head Department':'headDept','Finance':'finance','Project Manager':'projectManager','Cost Control':'costControl','GM/CFO':'gmCfo'};
  const allSteps = [{ label:'Dibuat Oleh', key:'user' }, ...steps.map(s => ({ label:s, key:keyMap[s] }))];
  allSteps.forEach(({label, key}) => {
    const s = doc.sigs[key] || {};
    const isApp = s.status==='APPROVED'||s.status==='SUBMITTED';
    const isRej = s.status==='REJECTED';
    const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'sig-box';
    let area = '';
    if (isApp) {
      if (s.signatureText && s.signatureText.indexOf('data:image') === 0) {
        area = `<div class="sig-area sig-app" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><img src="${s.signatureText}" style="max-height:36px; max-width:130px; object-fit:contain;" /></div>`;
      } else if (s.signature && s.signature.indexOf('data:image') === 0) {
        area = `<div class="sig-area sig-app" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><img src="${s.signature}" style="max-height:36px; max-width:130px; object-fit:contain;" /></div>`;
      } else {
        area = `<div class="sig-area sig-app">${genSVGSig(s.name||'')}</div>`;
      }
    }
    else if (isRej) area = `<div class="sig-area sig-rej">REJECTED</div>`;
    else area = `<div class="sig-area sig-pend">⏳ PENDING</div>`;
    div.innerHTML = `<div class="sig-ttl">${label}</div>${area}<div class="sig-name">${s.name||'-'}</div><div class="sig-date">${s.date?new Date(s.date).toLocaleDateString('id-ID'):''}</div>`;
    sigRow.appendChild(div);
  });

  // Show/hide buttons based on role access
  const isPmLeave = isPMOnLeave();
  const canApprove = doc.status === 'Pending' && (doc.currentApprover === session.role || (session.role === 'KTT' && isPmLeave && doc.currentApprover === 'Project Manager'));
  $('btnApprove').style.display = canApprove ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
  $('btnReject').style.display = canApprove ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';

  $('reviewModal').classList.add('open');
}

function closeModal() { $('reviewModal').classList.remove('open'); activeReview = null; }

function doApprove(action) {
  if (!activeReview) return;
  if (action === 'REJECT') {
    const reason = prompt('Masukkan alasan penolakan:');
    if (reason === null) return;
    if (!reason.trim()) { toast('Alasan wajib diisi!', true); return; }
  }
  loader(true);
  setTimeout(() => {
    const doc = DB.requests.find(r => r.id === activeReview.id);
    if (!doc) { loader(false); return; }
    const isPmLeave = isPMOnLeave();
    let activeRole = session.role;
    if (session.role === 'KTT' && isPmLeave && doc.currentApprover === 'Project Manager') {
      activeRole = 'Project Manager';
    }
    const keyMap = {
      'Supervisor': doc.type === 'PD' ? 'deptHeadPm' : 'supervisor',
      'Head Department': doc.type === 'PD' ? 'deptHeadPm' : 'supervisor',
      'Project Manager': doc.type === 'PD' ? 'deptHeadPm' : 'projectManager',
      'Finance': doc.type === 'PD' ? 'financeSite' : 'finance',
      'Finance Site': 'financeSite',
      'Cost Control': 'costControl',
      'GM/CFO': doc.type === 'PD' ? 'gmDept' : 'gmCfo'
    };
    const steps = getApprovalSteps(doc.type, doc.dept, doc.nominal);
    const k = keyMap[activeRole];

    if (action === 'APPROVE') {
      doc.sigs[k] = { name: session.name, role: activeRole, date: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'APPROVED', signatureText: session.signature || '' };
      const idx = steps.indexOf(activeRole);
      if (idx >= 0 && idx < steps.length - 1) { doc.currentApprover = steps[idx + 1]; }
      else { doc.status = 'Approved'; doc.currentApprover = 'None'; }
      DB.logs.unshift({ ts: new Date().toLocaleString('id-ID'), user: session.name, act: 'Approved at ' + activeRole, mod: 'Approval', doc: doc.docNumber, ip: '192.168.10.' + Math.floor(Math.random()*200+10) });
      toast('Dokumen disetujui! ' + (doc.status==='Approved'?'Proses selesai.':'Diteruskan ke '+doc.currentApprover));
    } else {
      doc.sigs[k] = { name: session.name, role: activeRole, date: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'REJECTED' };
      doc.status = 'Rejected'; doc.currentApprover = 'None';
      DB.logs.unshift({ ts: new Date().toLocaleString('id-ID'), user: session.name, act: 'Rejected at ' + activeRole, mod: 'Approval', doc: doc.docNumber, ip: '192.168.10.' + Math.floor(Math.random()*200+10) });
      toast('Dokumen ditolak!', true);
    }
    loader(false);
    updatePendingBadge();
    closeModal();
    loadApproval();
  }, 500);
}

function loadListView(tbodyId, list, showView) {
  const tb = $(tbodyId); if (!tb) return;
  tb.innerHTML = '';
  if (!list.length) { tb.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="10" style="text-align:center;padding:16px">Tidak ada data</td></tr>'; return; }
  list.forEach((r, i) => {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML = `<td>${i+1}</td><td><span class="pill p-${r.type.toLowerCase()}">${r.type}</span></td>
      <td><a style="color:var(--cy);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600" onclick="openReview('${r.id}')">${r.docNumber}</a></td>
      <td>${r.subject.slice(0,40)}</td>
      <td>${r.userFor || '-'}</td>
      <td>${r.requester}</td><td>${r.date}</td>
      <td style="font-weight:700">${rpFull(r.nominal)}</td>
      <td><span class="pill p-${r.status.toLowerCase()}">${r.status}</span></td>
      <td>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="openReview('${r.id}')"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i></button>
        ${r.status==='Approved'?`<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="openPDFModal(DB.requests.find(x=>x.id==='${r.id}'))"><i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i></button>`:''}
      </td>`;
    tb.appendChild(tr);
  });
}

function loadDraftView() {
  const tb = $('draftTbody'); tb.innerHTML = '';
  if (!DB.drafts.length) { tb.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;padding:16px">Belum ada draft tersimpan</td></tr>'; return; }
  DB.drafts.forEach((d, i) => {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML = `<td>${i+1}</td><td><span class="pill p-${d.type.toLowerCase()}">${d.type}</span></td>
      <td>${d.docNo}</td><td>${d.subject}</td><td>${d.requester}</td><td>${d.saved}</td>
      <td><button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">Lanjut Edit</button> <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="DB.drafts.splice(${i},1);loadDraftView()"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button></td>`;
    tb.appendChild(tr);
  });
}

/* ==============================================
   BUDGET
   ============================================== */
function loadBudget() {
  const total = DB.budgets.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.Annual,0);
  const actual = DB.budgets.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.Actual,0);
  const avail = total - actual;
  const util = Math.round(actual/total*100);
  $('bTotal').textContent = rpFull(total);
  $('bActual').textContent = rpFull(actual);
  $('bAvail').textContent = rpFull(avail);
  $('bUtil').textContent = util + '%';
  const pal = ['#00e5ff','#ffb300','#2979ff','#00e676','#ff1744','#d500f9','#9ca3af'];
  const labels = DB.budgets.map(b=>b.Dept);
  if (charts.bb) charts.bb.destroy();
  charts.bb = new Chart($('chartBBar').getContext('2d'),{type:'bar',data:{labels,datasets:[{label:'Annual',data:DB.budgets.map(b=>b.Annual),backgroundColor:'rgba(41,121,255,.6)',borderColor:'#2979ff',borderWidth:1},{label:'Actual',data:DB.budgets.map(b=>b.Actual),backgroundColor:'rgba(0,230,118,.6)',borderColor:'#00e676',borderWidth:1}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{labels:{color:'#f3f4f6'}}},scales:{x:{ticks:{color:'#9ca3af'}},y:{ticks:{color:'#9ca3af'}}}}});
  if (charts.bp) charts.bp.destroy();
  charts.bp = new Chart($('chartBPie').getContext('2d'),{type:'pie',data:{labels,datasets:[{data:DB.budgets.map(b=>b.Annual),backgroundColor:pal}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{position:'right',labels:{color:'#f3f4f6',boxWidth:10}}}}});
}

function loadBudgetTahunan() {
  const isAdmin = session && session.role === 'Administrator';
  const tb = $('budgTahunanTbody');
  tb.innerHTML = '';

  // Tampilkan action bar sesuai role
  if (isAdmin) {
    $('budgetAdminBar').style.display = 'flex';
    $('budgetUserBar').style.display = 'none';
    // Tampilkan kolom Aksi
    document.querySelectorAll('.budget-admin-col').forEach(el => el.style.display = '');
    // Update opsi departemen di form dari DB
    const deptSel = $('budgetFormDept');
    if (deptSel && DB.departments && DB.departments.length) {
      deptSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Pilih Departemen --</option>' +
        DB.departments.map(d => `<option value="${d.Code}">${d.Code}</option>`).join('');
    }
  } else {
    $('budgetAdminBar').style.display = 'none';
    $('budgetUserBar').style.display = 'block';
    document.querySelectorAll('.budget-admin-col').forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
  }

  if (!DB.budgets || !DB.budgets.length) {
    tb.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--t3)">Belum ada data budget tahunan</td></tr>';
    return;
  }

  DB.budgets.forEach((b, i) => {
    const ann = b.Annual || 0;
    const act = b.Actual || 0;
    const util = ann > 0 ? Math.round(act / ann * 100) : 0;
    const avail = ann - act;
    const utilClass = util > 80 ? 'p-rejected' : util > 60 ? 'p-pending' : 'p-approved';
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML = `
      <td>${i + 1}</td>
      <td><b>${b.Dept || b.Department || '-'}</b></td>
      <td>${b.Year || '-'}</td>
      <td style="font-weight:700">${rpFull(ann)}</td>
      <td>${rpFull(act)}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--gr);font-weight:700">${rpFull(avail)}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${utilClass}">${util}%</span></td>
      <td class="budget-admin-col" style="${isAdmin ? '' : 'display:none;'} text-align:center;">
        <button class="btn btn-sm" style="padding:3px 8px;font-size:10px;" onclick="openEditBudgetModal('${b.id || b.ID}')">
          <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
        </button>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" style="padding:3px 8px;font-size:10px;background:var(--red,#e53e3e);border-color:var(--red,#e53e3e);" onclick="deleteBudgetRecord('${b.id || b.ID}')">
          <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
        </button>
      </td>`;
    tb.appendChild(tr);
  });
}

/* ------ BUDGET MODAL FUNCTIONS ------ */
function openAddBudgetModal() {
  $('budgetModalTitle').textContent = 'Tambah Budget Tahunan';
  $('budgetFormId').value = '';
  $('budgetFormDept').value = '';
  $('budgetFormYear').value = new Date().getFullYear();
  $('budgetFormAnnual').value = '';
  $('budgetFormActual').value = '';
  $('budgetFormAnnualPreview').textContent = '';
  $('budgetFormActualPreview').textContent = '';
  $('budgetModal').classList.add('open');
}

function openEditBudgetModal(id) {
  const b = DB.budgets.find(x => (x.id || x.ID) === id);
  if (!b) return toast('Data budget tidak ditemukan');
  $('budgetModalTitle').textContent = 'Edit Budget Tahunan';
  $('budgetFormId').value = id;
  $('budgetFormDept').value = b.Dept || b.Department || '';
  $('budgetFormYear').value = b.Year || '';
  $('budgetFormAnnual').value = b.Annual || 0;
  $('budgetFormActual').value = b.Actual || 0;
  $('budgetFormAnnualPreview').textContent = rpFull(b.Annual || 0);
  $('budgetFormActualPreview').textContent = rpFull(b.Actual || 0);
  $('budgetModal').classList.add('open');
}

function closeBudgetModal() {
  $('budgetModal').classList.remove('open');
}

function saveBudgetRecord(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const id     = $('budgetFormId').value.trim();
  const dept   = $('budgetFormDept').value.trim();
  const year   = parseInt($('budgetFormYear').value) || 0;
  const annual = parseFloat($('budgetFormAnnual').value) || 0;
  const actual = parseFloat($('budgetFormActual').value) || 0;

  if (!dept || !year) return toast('Departemen dan Tahun wajib diisi', 'error');

  if (id) {
    // Edit existing
    const idx = DB.budgets.findIndex(x => (x.id || x.ID) === id);
    if (idx !== -1) {
      DB.budgets[idx] = { ...DB.budgets[idx], Dept: dept, Department: dept, Year: year, Annual: annual, Actual: actual };
      toast('Budget berhasil diperbarui ✓');
    }
  } else {
    // Tambah baru
    const newId = 'BDG-' + Date.now();
    DB.budgets.push({ id: newId, ID: newId, Dept: dept, Department: dept, Year: year, Annual: annual, Actual: actual, Project: '' });
    toast('Budget baru berhasil ditambahkan ✓');
  }
  closeBudgetModal();
  loadBudgetTahunan();
}

function deleteBudgetRecord(id) {
  if (!confirm('Hapus data budget ini? Tindakan tidak dapat diurungkan.')) return;
  const idx = DB.budgets.findIndex(x => (x.id || x.ID) === id);
  if (idx !== -1) {
    DB.budgets.splice(idx, 1);
    toast('Data budget berhasil dihapus');
    loadBudgetTahunan();
  }
}

/* ------ EXPORT / IMPORT CSV ------ */
function exportBudgetCSV() {
  if (!DB.budgets || !DB.budgets.length) return toast('Tidak ada data untuk diekspor', 'warn');
  const headers = ['No', 'Department', 'Tahun', 'Annual Budget', 'Actual Budget', 'Available', 'Utilization (%)'];
  const rows = DB.budgets.map((b, i) => {
    const ann   = b.Annual || 0;
    const act   = b.Actual || 0;
    const avail = ann - act;
    const util  = ann > 0 ? Math.round(act / ann * 100) : 0;
    return [i + 1, b.Dept || b.Department || '', b.Year || '', ann, act, avail, util + '%'];
  });
  let csv = '\uFEFF' + headers.join(',') + '\n'; // BOM untuk Excel UTF-8
  rows.forEach(r => { csv += r.map(v => `"${v}"`).join(',') + '\n'; });

  const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
  const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a    = document.createElement('a');
  a.href     = url;
  a.download = `Budget_Tahunan_${new Date().getFullYear()}.csv`;
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  toast('Export Excel (CSV) berhasil diunduh ✓');
}

function downloadBudgetTemplate() {
  const csv = '\uFEFFDepartment,Tahun,Annual Budget,Actual Budget\nHRGA,2026,650000000,420000000\nQAQC,2026,300000000,190000000\n';
  const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
  const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a    = document.createElement('a');
  a.href     = url;
  a.download = 'Template_Import_Budget.csv';
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  toast('Template CSV berhasil diunduh ✓');
}

function importBudgetCSV(input) {
  const file = input.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = function(e) {
    try {
      const text  = e.target.result.replace(/^\uFEFF/, ''); // strip BOM
      const lines = text.split(/\r?\n/).filter(l => l.trim());
      if (lines.length < 2) return toast('File CSV kosong atau tidak valid', 'error');

      const headers = lines[0].split(',').map(h => h.replace(/"/g, '').trim().toLowerCase());
      const deptIdx   = headers.findIndex(h => h.includes('department') || h.includes('dept'));
      const yearIdx   = headers.findIndex(h => h.includes('tahun') || h.includes('year'));
      const annualIdx = headers.findIndex(h => h.includes('annual'));
      const actualIdx = headers.findIndex(h => h.includes('actual'));

      if (deptIdx < 0 || yearIdx < 0 || annualIdx < 0) {
        return toast('Header CSV tidak sesuai. Pastikan ada kolom: Department, Tahun, Annual Budget', 'error');
      }

      const imported = [];
      for (let i = 1; i < lines.length; i++) {
        const cols = lines[i].split(',').map(c => c.replace(/"/g, '').trim());
        const dept   = cols[deptIdx] || '';
        const year   = parseInt(cols[yearIdx]) || 0;
        const annual = parseFloat(cols[annualIdx]) || 0;
        const actual = actualIdx >= 0 ? parseFloat(cols[actualIdx]) || 0 : 0;
        if (!dept || !year) continue;
        const newId = 'BDG-IMP-' + i + '-' + Date.now();
        imported.push({ id: newId, ID: newId, Dept: dept, Department: dept, Year: year, Annual: annual, Actual: actual, Project: '' });
      }

      if (!imported.length) return toast('Tidak ada data valid yang ditemukan di file', 'error');

      if (confirm(`Import ${imported.length} data budget? Data lama akan ditambahkan (bukan dihapus).`)) {
        DB.budgets = DB.budgets.concat(imported);
        toast(`${imported.length} data budget berhasil diimport ✓`);
        loadBudgetTahunan();
      }
    } catch(err) {
      toast('Gagal membaca file CSV: ' + err.message, 'error');
    }
    input.value = ''; // reset file input
  };
  reader.readAsText(file, 'UTF-8');
}

// Preview angka di form budget
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  ['budgetFormAnnual', 'budgetFormActual'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);

/* ==============================================
   PDF ARCHIVE
   ============================================== */
function loadPDFArchive() {
  let approved = DB.requests.filter(r => r.status === 'Approved');
  
  // Filter by department unless the user is Finance or Administrator
  const isFinanceOrAdmin = session && (
    session.role === 'Finance' || 
    session.dept === 'Finance' || 
    session.role === 'Administrator' || 
    session.dept === 'IT'
  );
  if (!isFinanceOrAdmin && session && session.dept) {
    approved = approved.filter(r => r.dept === session.dept);
  }

  // Read filter values
  const typeF = $('pdfType') ? $('pdfType').value : '';
  const deptF = $('pdfDept') ? $('pdfDept').value : '';
  const monthF = $('pdfMonth') ? $('pdfMonth').value : '';
  const yearF = $('pdfYear') ? $('pdfYear').value : '';
  const searchF = $('pdfSearch') ? $('pdfSearch').value.toLowerCase().trim() : '';

  approved = approved.filter(r => {
    const matchesType = !typeF || r.type === typeF;
    const matchesDept = !deptF || r.dept === deptF;
    
    const reqDate = new Date(r.date);
    const reqMonth = ('0' + (reqDate.getMonth() + 1)).slice(-2);
    const reqYear = String(reqDate.getFullYear());
    
    const matchesMonth = !monthF || reqMonth === monthF;
    const matchesYear = !yearF || reqYear === yearF;
    
    const docNo = (r.docNumber || '').toLowerCase();
    const subject = (r.subject || '').toLowerCase();
    const matchesSearch = !searchF || docNo.includes(searchF) || subject.includes(searchF);

    return matchesType && matchesDept && matchesMonth && matchesYear && matchesSearch;
  });

  const tb = $('pdfArchiveTbody'); tb.innerHTML = '';
  if (!approved.length) { tb.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;padding:16px">Belum ada dokumen yang approved</td></tr>'; return; }
  approved.forEach((r, i) => {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML = `<td>${i+1}</td><td><b>${r.docNumber}</b></td><td><span class="pill p-${r.type.toLowerCase()}">${r.type}</span></td>
      <td>${r.subject.slice(0,40)}</td><td>${r.date}</td>
      <td>
        <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openPDFModal(DB.requests.find(x=>x.id==='${r.id}'))"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Preview</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="activePDFDoc=DB.requests.find(x=>x.id==='${r.id}');doPrint()"><i class="fas fa-print"></i> Print</button>
      </td>`;
    tb.appendChild(tr);
  });
}

/* ==============================================
   MASTER DATA
   ============================================== */
function loadMaster(type) {
  const isAdmin = session && session.role === 'Administrator';
  
  if (type === 'user') {
    $('adminUserActions').style.display = isAdmin ? 'block' : 'none';
    const cols = document.querySelectorAll('#view-master-user .admin-only-col');
    cols.forEach(c => c.style.display = isAdmin ? 'table-cell' : 'none');
  }

  if (type === 'dept') {
    $('mDeptTbody').innerHTML = DB.departments.map((d,i)=>`<tr><td>${i+1}</td><td><b>${d.Code}</b></td><td>${d.Name}</td><td><span class="pill p-approved">Active</span></td></tr>`).join('');
  } else if (type === 'project') {
    $('mProjTbody').innerHTML = DB.projects.map((p,i)=>`<tr><td>${i+1}</td><td><b>${p.Code}</b></td><td>${p.Name}</td><td><span class="pill p-approved">Active</span></td></tr>`).join('');
  } else if (type === 'coa') {
    $('mCoaTbody').innerHTML = DB.coas.map((c,i)=>`<tr><td>${i+1}</td><td><b>${c.Code}</b></td><td>${c.Name}</td><td><span class="pill p-approved">Active</span></td></tr>`).join('');
  } else if (type === 'user') {
    $('mUserTbody').innerHTML = DB.users.map((u,i)=>{
      const statusText = u.status || (u.active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive');
      let pillClass = 'p-approved';
      if (statusText === 'Inactive') pillClass = 'p-rejected';
      else if (statusText === 'Cuti') pillClass = 'p-pending';
      return `
        <tr>
          <td>${i+1}</td>
          <td><b>${u.username}</b></td>
          <td>${u.name}</td>
          <td><span class="pill p-pending">${u.role}</span></td>
          <td>${u.dept}</td>
          <td><span class="pill ${pillClass}">${statusText}</span></td>
          ${isAdmin ? `<td style="text-align:center;"><button class="btn btn-xs" onclick="openEditUserModal('${u.id}')"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i> Edit</button> <button class="btn btn-danger btn-xs" onclick="deleteUser('${u.id}')"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button></td>` : ''}
        </tr>
      `;
    }).join('');
  }
}

function loadMatrix() {
  const isAdmin = session && session.role === 'Administrator';
  const cols = document.querySelectorAll('#view-matrix .admin-only-col');
  cols.forEach(c => c.style.display = isAdmin ? 'table-cell' : 'none');

  $('matrixTbody').innerHTML = DB.matrix.map((m,i)=>`
    <tr>
      <td>${i+1}</td>
      <td><span class="pill p-${m.type.toLowerCase()}">${m.type}</span></td>
      <td><b>${m.dept || 'ALL'}</b></td>
      <td>${rpFull(m.min)}</td>
      <td>${rpFull(m.max)}</td>
      <td>${m.steps.map((s,j)=>`<span class="pill p-draft" style="margin:1px">${j+1}. ${s}</span>`).join(' ')}</td>
      ${isAdmin ? `<td style="text-align:center;">
        <button class="btn btn-xs" style="margin-right:4px;" onclick="openEditMatrixModal('${m.id}')"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i> Edit</button>
        <button class="btn btn-xs btn-danger" onclick="deleteMatrix('${m.id}')"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Hapus</button>
      </td>` : ''}
    </tr>
  `).join('');
}

function openAddUserModal() {
  $('userModalTitle').textContent = 'Tambah User Baru';
  $('userFormId').value = '';
  $('userFormName').value = '';
  $('userFormUser').value = '';
  $('userFormPass').value = '';
  $('userFormRole').value = 'User';
  
  const deptSelect = $('userFormDept');
  deptSelect.innerHTML = DB.departments.map(d => `<option value="${d.Code}">${d.Code} - ${d.Name}</option>`).join('');
  
  $('userFormStatus').value = 'Active';
  $('userModal').classList.add('open');
}

function openEditUserModal(id) {
  const u = DB.users.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!u) return;
  $('userModalTitle').textContent = 'Edit User Profile';
  $('userFormId').value = u.id;
  $('userFormName').value = u.name;
  $('userFormUser').value = u.username;
  $('userFormPass').value = u.password;
  $('userFormRole').value = u.role;
  
  const deptSelect = $('userFormDept');
  deptSelect.innerHTML = DB.departments.map(d => `<option value="${d.Code}" ${d.Code===u.dept?'selected':''}>${d.Code} - ${d.Name}</option>`).join('');
  
  $('userFormStatus').value = u.status || (u.active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive');
  $('userModal').classList.add('open');
}

function closeUserModal() {
  $('userModal').classList.remove('open');
}

function saveUser(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const id = $('userFormId').value;
  const name = $('userFormName').value;
  const username = $('userFormUser').value;
  const password = $('userFormPass').value;
  const role = $('userFormRole').value;
  const dept = $('userFormDept').value;
  const status = $('userFormStatus').value;
  const active = status !== 'Inactive';
  
  if (id) {
    const idx = DB.users.findIndex(x => x.id === id);
    if (idx !== -1) {
      DB.users[idx] = { ...DB.users[idx], name, username, password, role, dept, active, status };
      toast('User profile berhasil diperbarui');
    }
  } else {
    const newId = 'USR' + (DB.users.length + 1);
    DB.users.push({ id: newId, name, username, password, role, dept, active, status, signature: '' });
    toast('User baru berhasil ditambahkan');
  }
  closeUserModal();
  loadMaster('user');
}

function deleteUser(id) {
  if (id === session.id) {
    alert("Anda tidak dapat menghapus akun Anda sendiri!");
    return;
  }
  if (confirm("Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus user ini?")) {
    const idx = DB.users.findIndex(x => x.id === id);
    if (idx !== -1) {
      DB.users.splice(idx, 1);
      toast('User berhasil dihapus');
      loadMaster('user');
    }
  }
}

    select.innerHTML = optionsHtml;
    select.value = selectedVal || 'ALL';
  }
}

  $('matrixFormId').value = '';
  $('matrixFormDocType').value = 'PD';
  
  populateLocalMatrixDeptDropdown('ALL');
  
  $('matrixFormMinAmount').value = 0;

  }

}

function openEditMatrixModal(id) {
  const m = DB.matrix.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!m) return;
  
  $('matrixModalTitle').textContent = 'Edit Matrix Approval';
  $('matrixFormId').value = m.id;
  $('matrixFormDocType').value = m.type;
  
  populateLocalMatrixDeptDropdown(m.dept || 'ALL');
  
  $('matrixFormMinAmount').value = m.min || 0;
  $('matrixFormMaxAmount').value = m.max || 99999999999;
  
  for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
    const select = $('matrixStep' + i);
    const stepVal = m.steps[i - 1] || 'None';
    select.value = stepVal;
  }
  $('matrixModal').classList.add('open');
}

function closeMatrixModal() {
  $('matrixModal').classList.remove('open');
}

function saveMatrix(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const id = $('matrixFormId').value;
  const type = $('matrixFormDocType').value;
  const dept = $('matrixFormDept').value;
  const min = parseFloat($('matrixFormMinAmount').value) || 0;
  const max = parseFloat($('matrixFormMaxAmount').value) || 0;
  const steps = [];
  
  for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
    const val = $('matrixStep' + i).value;
    if (val !== 'None') {
      steps.push(val);
    }
  }
  if (steps.length === 0) {
    alert("Minimal harus ada 1 alur approval!");
    return;
  }
  
  if (id) {
    const idx = DB.matrix.findIndex(x => x.id === id);
    if (idx !== -1) {
      DB.matrix[idx] = { id, type, dept, min, max, steps };
      toast('Matrix alur approval berhasil diperbarui');
    }
  } else {
    const newId = 'AM' + (DB.matrix.length + 1);
    DB.matrix.push({ id: newId, type, dept, min, max, steps });
    toast('Matrix alur approval baru berhasil ditambahkan');
  }
  closeMatrixModal();
  loadMatrix();
}

function deleteMatrix(id) {
  if (confirm("Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus matrix approval ini?")) {
    const idx = DB.matrix.findIndex(x => x.id === id);
    if (idx !== -1) {
      DB.matrix.splice(idx, 1);
      toast('Matrix approval berhasil dihapus');
      loadMatrix();
    }
  }
}

function filterArchive() {
  const typeF = $('archType').value;
  const statusF = $('archStatus').value;
  const deptF = $('archDept').value;
  const monthF = $('archMonth').value;
  const yearF = $('archYear').value;
  
  const list = DB.requests.filter(r => {
    const matchesType = !typeF || r.type === typeF;
    const matchesStatus = !statusF || r.status.toLowerCase() === statusF.toLowerCase();
    const matchesDept = !deptF || r.dept === deptF;
    
    const reqDate = new Date(r.date);
    const reqMonth = ('0' + (reqDate.getMonth() + 1)).slice(-2);
    const reqYear = String(reqDate.getFullYear());
    
    const matchesMonth = !monthF || reqMonth === monthF;
    const matchesYear = !yearF || reqYear === yearF;
    
    return matchesType && matchesStatus && matchesDept && matchesMonth && matchesYear;
  });
  
  loadListView('archTbody', list, true);
}

/* ==============================================
   CUSTOM SIGNATURE CANVAS
   ============================================== */
let sigCanvas, sigCtx;
let sigDrawing = false;
let sigLastX = 0, sigLastY = 0;

function setupSignatureCanvas() {
  sigCanvas = $('signature-canvas');
  if (!sigCanvas) return;
  sigCtx = sigCanvas.getContext('2d');
  
  sigCtx.strokeStyle = '#121b2d';
  sigCtx.lineWidth = 3;
  sigCtx.lineCap = 'round';
  sigCtx.lineJoin = 'round';
  
  sigCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
    sigDrawing = true;
    [sigLastX, sigLastY] = getCanvasMousePos(sigCanvas, e);
  });
  sigCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', drawSigStroke);
  sigCanvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => sigDrawing = false);
  sigCanvas.addEventListener('mouseout', () => sigDrawing = false);
  
  // Touch support
  sigCanvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
    sigDrawing = true;
    const touch = e.touches[0];
    [sigLastX, sigLastY] = getCanvasTouchPos(sigCanvas, touch);
    e.preventDefault();
  }, { passive: false });
  
  sigCanvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
    if (!sigDrawing) return;
    const touch = e.touches[0];
    const [x, y] = getCanvasTouchPos(sigCanvas, touch);
    sigCtx.beginPath();
    sigCtx.moveTo(sigLastX, sigLastY);
    sigCtx.lineTo(x, y);
    sigCtx.stroke();
    [sigLastX, sigLastY] = [x, y];
    e.preventDefault();
  }, { passive: false });
  
  sigCanvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => sigDrawing = false);
}

function getCanvasMousePos(canvasDom, mouseEvent) {
  const rect = canvasDom.getBoundingClientRect();
  return [
    mouseEvent.clientX - rect.left,
    mouseEvent.clientY - rect.top
  ];
}

function getCanvasTouchPos(canvasDom, touchEvent) {
  const rect = canvasDom.getBoundingClientRect();
  return [
    touchEvent.clientX - rect.left,
    touchEvent.clientY - rect.top
  ];
}

function drawSigStroke(e) {
  if (!sigDrawing) return;
  const [x, y] = getCanvasMousePos(sigCanvas, e);
  sigCtx.beginPath();
  sigCtx.moveTo(sigLastX, sigLastY);
  sigCtx.lineTo(x, y);
  sigCtx.stroke();
  [sigLastX, sigLastY] = [x, y];
}

function clearSignatureCanvas() {
  if (!sigCtx) return;
  sigCtx.clearRect(0, 0, sigCanvas.width, sigCanvas.height);
  const uploadInput = document.getElementById('signature-upload');
  if (uploadInput) uploadInput.value = '';
}

function handleSignatureUpload(event) {
  const file = event.target.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = function(e) {
    const img = new Image();
    img.onload = function() {
      if (!sigCtx || !sigCanvas) return;
      // Clear canvas
      sigCtx.clearRect(0, 0, sigCanvas.width, sigCanvas.height);
      
      // Calculate fit dimensions
      const wrh = img.width / img.height;
      let newWidth = sigCanvas.width;
      let newHeight = newWidth / wrh;
      if (newHeight > sigCanvas.height) {
        newHeight = sigCanvas.height;
        newWidth = newHeight * wrh;
      }
      
      const xOffset = (sigCanvas.width - newWidth) / 2;
      const yOffset = (sigCanvas.height - newHeight) / 2;
      
      sigCtx.drawImage(img, xOffset, yOffset, newWidth, newHeight);
    };
    img.src = e.target.result;
  };
  reader.readAsDataURL(file);
}

function openSignatureModal() {
  $('signatureModal').classList.add('open');
  clearSignatureCanvas();
  
  const preview = $('active-signature-preview');
  if (session && session.signature) {
    preview.innerHTML = `<img src="${session.signature}" style="max-height:55px; max-width:280px; object-fit:contain;" />`;
  } else {
    preview.innerHTML = `<span style="font-size:11px; color:var(--t3); font-style:italic;">Belum ada tanda tangan kustom</span>`;
  }
}

function closeSignatureModal() {
  $('signatureModal').classList.remove('open');
}

function saveSignature() {
  const blank = document.createElement('canvas');
  blank.width = sigCanvas.width;
  blank.height = sigCanvas.height;
  if (sigCanvas.toDataURL() === blank.toDataURL()) {
    alert("Silakan gambar tanda tangan Anda terlebih dahulu.");
    return;
  }
  
  const base64Data = sigCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');
  session.signature = base64Data;
  
  // Save to DB
  const dbUser = DB.users.find(u => u.username === session.username);
  if (dbUser) dbUser.signature = base64Data;
  
  // Save to sessionStorage
  sessionStorage.setItem('currentUser', JSON.stringify(session));
  
  openSignatureModal(); // refresh preview
  toast('Tanda tangan kustom Anda berhasil disimpan.');
}

function previewLocalBudgetCapture(input) {
  const container = document.getElementById('pd-budget-capture-local-preview-container');
  const preview = document.getElementById('pd-budget-capture-local-preview');
  if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(e) {
      if (preview) preview.src = e.target.result;
      if (container) container.style.display = 'block';
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
  } else {
    if (preview) preview.src = '';
    if (container) container.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

function toggleLocalNotifDropdown(event) {
  if (event) event.stopPropagation();
  const dropdown = document.getElementById('local-notif-dropdown');
  if (!dropdown) return;
  const isCurrentlyVisible = dropdown.style.display === 'block';
  
  if (isCurrentlyVisible) {
    dropdown.style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    dropdown.style.display = 'block';
    // Clear badge and unread count since they have been opened/viewed
    const badge = document.getElementById('notifCount');
    const unreadCount = document.getElementById('local-notif-unread-count');
    if (badge) badge.style.display = 'none';
    if (unreadCount) unreadCount.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

// Click outside to close local notifications dropdown
window.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const dropdown = document.getElementById('local-notif-dropdown');
  const btn = document.getElementById('local-notif-btn');
  if (dropdown && dropdown.style.display === 'block') {
    if (!dropdown.contains(e.target) && (!btn || !btn.contains(e.target))) {
      dropdown.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }
});

function renderPDFToCanvases(base64Data, container) {
  if (!window.pdfjsLib) {
    container.textContent = 'PDF.js library not loaded.';
    return Promise.resolve();
  }
  
  pdfjsLib.GlobalWorkerOptions.workerSrc = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/2.16.105/pdf.worker.min.js';
  
  try {
    const pdfData = atob(base64Data.split(',')[1]);
    const loadingTask = pdfjsLib.getDocument({data: pdfData});
    return loadingTask.promise.then(function(pdf) {
      container.innerHTML = ''; // Clear loading message
      
      const renderPagePromises = [];
      for (let pageNum = 1; pageNum <= pdf.numPages; pageNum++) {
        const pagePromise = pdf.getPage(pageNum).then(function(page) {
          const viewport = page.getViewport({scale: 1.5});
          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
          canvas.style.display = 'block';
          canvas.style.margin = '20px auto';
          canvas.style.maxWidth = '100%';
          canvas.style.height = 'auto';
          canvas.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)';
          
          canvas.width = viewport.width;
          canvas.height = viewport.height;
          
          const context = canvas.getContext('2d');
          const renderContext = {
            canvasContext: context,
            viewport: viewport
          };
          
          return page.render(renderContext).promise.then(() => {
            container.appendChild(canvas);
          });
        });
        renderPagePromises.push(pagePromise);
      }
      return Promise.all(renderPagePromises);
    }).catch(err => {
      console.error(err);
      container.textContent = 'Gagal menampilkan PDF: ' + err.message;
    });
  } catch (e) {
    console.error(e);
    container.textContent = 'Gagal memproses file PDF.';
    return Promise.resolve();
  }
}

/* ==============================================
   INIT ON LOAD
   ============================================== */
function initOnLoad() {
  buildDemoChips();
  setupSignatureCanvas();
  
  // Restore session
  const savedSession = sessionStorage.getItem('currentUser');
  if (savedSession) {
    session = JSON.parse(savedSession);
    
    // Sync the active signature from DB state
    const dbUser = DB.users.find(u => u.username === session.username);
    if (dbUser && dbUser.signature) {
      session.signature = dbUser.signature;
    }
    
    $('loginPage').style.display = 'none';
    $('app').style.display = 'flex';
    initApp();
  }
}

if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initOnLoad);
} else {
  initOnLoad();
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
